4月29日 周三DAY 62
4/29 周三 Beijing 下午（Bloomberg · WSJ · WaPo · Kpler · Treasury · Trump · Bessent · Rubio） BREAKING 外交 能源
美方"封锁不松手"+ Iran 储油剩 12-22 天 + WaPo 提案细节"先 Hormuz·后核谈"：(1) BBG 4/29 06:46 UTC "US Signals No Letup of Naval Blockade"·Trump 告幕僚 prep extended blockade·风险低于恢复 hostilities 或无核协议撤离(WSJ 引白宫官员) · (2) Kpler 4/29 估算：Iran 储油容量剩 12-22 天·之后将被迫关井·油田恐永久受损 · (3) Bessent 4/28：maximum pressure 已致 Iran 通胀加速·"oil storage running out·will soon have to start cutting production" · (4) WaPo 4/28 独家：Iran 提案双向同步解封锁·美撤 Iran 港口封锁=换 Iran 重开海峡·核谈搁置至后期·提案模糊"军事协调通行 / 通行费"机制 · (5) Treasury 4/28 制裁 Iran"shadow banking architecture" 35 实体 / 个人·同步警告海外银行涉 Iran 油 sanctions 暴露
BBG："US Signals No Letup of Naval Blockade"(Bloomberg 4/29 06:46 UTC)：Bloomberg 4/29 头条："The US signaled it would stick with a naval blockade of Iranian ports, as it tries to choke-off Tehran's oil exports and force it back to the negotiating table"。WSJ 引白宫匿名官员："Trump has told his aides to prepare for an extended blockade·that it carries less of a risk for the US than resuming hostilities or walking away from the conflict without a deal that curbs Iran's nuclear activities"——Trump 内部已锁定"持续封锁"为 base case·5/1 War Powers 60 天后不再设新截止日·Iran 必须先结构性让步。

Kpler："Iran 储油剩 12-22 天"(Bloomberg 4/29 引 Kpler)：分析公司 Kpler 估算·"It's unclear how much storage and time Iran has left before it would need to close down wells, which may damage them permanently·Analytics firm Kpler estimates it has another 12 to 22 days"——这是 Iran 油田"shut-in"硬截止时点。Iran 老化油田(Khuzestan / Ahvaz / Marun)关井后重启风险高·部分 reservoir 可能因水侵 / sanding / coning永久损失 5-15% 产能。Wright(美能源部长)BBG TV 4/28："aging fields could be damaged if forced to turn off the taps"——美方清晰认知"封锁=Iran 油储备硬终结"链路。

WaPo Iran 提案细节："Hormuz first·nuclear later"(WaPo 4/28 21:01 UTC Gerry Shih + Sammy Westfall)：WaPo 独家·"The White House is weighing an Iranian proposal that would see the United States and Iran immediately lift their blockades in the Strait of Hormuz but delay talks regarding Iran's nuclear program and a larger peace deal"。Pakistan 官员 brief 提案细节："Iran is asking the U.S. to lift its blockade of Iranian ports in exchange for Tehran reopening the strait to maritime traffic·The official did not specify whether Tehran would still require vessels to coordinate passage with the country's military or to pay a toll"——Iran 提案三层模糊(同步解封锁 / 控制通行 / 通行费)是 Trump 拒绝核心。

Treasury 4/28 制裁 Iran "shadow banking"(Bloomberg 4/27 update)：Bloomberg 4/27 update："Washington also stepped up its economic pressure on Iran and parties connected to it on Tuesday, sanctioning 35 'entities and individuals that oversee Iran's shadow banking architecture'·The Trump administration also warned banks of sanctions exposure related to Iranian oil-related transactions"——美方在 Iran 提案评估同步升级金融制裁·包括针对第三方银行的二级制裁警告·这是从军事封锁向金融断流的同步推进。

战略含义：美方策略锁定"长封锁+硬核谈"双轨：BBG/WSJ 4/29 报道清晰显示·Trump 已选择"extended blockade"为最优策略·拒绝 Iran"分阶段"诉求·要求Day 1 同步解决核问题 + Hormuz 通行 + 通行权 sovereignty。Iran 的"先 Hormuz·后核谈"提案在Trump 内部 sustaining hawkish posture下接受概率降至 10-15%(此前 35-40%)。Day 62-65 决策树：(1) Iran 提交"修订提案"实质让步(IAEA 全权访问 + 现有 enriched material 转出) → 美方接受 stage 1 deal·概率 25%；(2) Iran 维持"分阶段"框架·美方拒绝 + 升级(航母再调度 / 制裁 Iran 央行 / 二级制裁 Russia 银行) → 概率 50%；(3) 谈判停摆延至 5 月中·OPEC 5/12 月会变量重新主导油价 → 概率 25%。Brent 区间定价：场景 1 = $95-100；场景 2 = $115-130；场景 3 = $108-115。
4/29 周三 Strasbourg / 东京 / Bloomberg TV（Bloomberg · Von der Leyen · Sergio Ermotti · Sanae Takaichi · Bruegel · Mubaraz） BREAKING 经济 市场
Von der Leyen + UBS Ermotti + 日本 PM 三线警报·Hormuz 通行首艘大型油轮：(1) Von der Leyen 4/29 Strasbourg 欧议会演讲：EU 战来多花€27B($31.6B) on fossil fuel imports·Bruegel 估算€10B+用于补贴消费者 / 企业·"echoes for months or even years" · (2) UBS CEO Ermotti BBG TV 4/29："市场对 Iran 过度乐观·近年的 V-shape recoveries 不会重演·政府已无 room boost growth" · (3) 日本 PM Takaichi 4/29 X 确认：日本关联大型 supertanker 4/29 完成 Hormuz transit·返航 Nagoya·美封锁来2 周内首艘大型油轮 · (4) Mubaraz UAE LNG carrier 4/28 已出 Hormuz·passing 印度南端·战来首艘 LNG 通行 · (5) EU 已通过首批应对措施·5 月加码"more aggressive"包括 LNG 多元化 / 战略储备扩张 / fertilizer 进口替代
Von der Leyen Strasbourg："consequences may echo for years"(Bloomberg 4/29 07:35 UTC Jorge Valero)：Bloomberg 4/29："The European Union warned the continent may spend years grappling with fallout from the US-Israeli war in Iran·signaling that an energy price spike will not abate soon"。EU 委员会主席 Von der Leyen 4/29 在 Strasbourg 欧议会发言："There is also a harsh reality we all need to face: the consequences of this conflict may echo for months or even years to come"。具体数字：(1) EU 战来在化石燃料进口上多花 €27 billion($31.6B)；(2) Bruegel 估算 EU 国家承诺 €10 billion+用于补贴消费者 / 企业；(3) 上周委员会推出首批应对措施·5 月将加码 "more aggressive steps"。EU 内部分歧：部分国家(德 / 法)主张 gradual·部分(意 / 西 / 希)要求 bigger upfront package。

UBS Ermotti BBG TV："市场对 Iran over-confident"(Bloomberg 4/29 06:44 UTC Jan-Henrik Foerster + Guy Johnson)：UBS Group CEO Sergio Ermotti 接受 BBG TV 专访·罕见对市场前景明确警告："Financial markets are at risk of over-optimism regarding the Iran conflict·The expectation is not only that things are going to be resolved which we believe and hope·but the impact of what happened will be resolved in a classical way·Investors have seen multiple 'V-shaped' recoveries in recent years·Yet now·governments don't have a lot of room to boost growth"。Ermotti 暗示欧美央行政策空间已耗尽·若 Iran 战引发新一轮 inflation surge·主要央行无法 emergency cuts对冲。UBS 全球财富管理资产 $6.9T·全球最大财富管理机构表态对 buy-side 风险偏好有外溢效应。

日本 PM Takaichi X："Japan-linked supertanker 完成 Hormuz transit"(Bloomberg 4/29 07:56 UTC + Takaichi X)：日本首相 Sanae Takaichi 4/29 X 帖："A Japan-linked ship passed through the blockaded waterway on April 29 and was on its way to Japan·We have taken every opportunity to urge Iran that it is crucial to quickly ensure the free and safe passage of all vessels, including those of Japan"。Bloomberg 进一步："a Japan-linked crude supertanker had exited Hormuz late on Tuesday·before updating its destination to Japan's Nagoya early on Wednesday·It is one of the largest tankers to do so since the US began its blockade of Iranian ports two weeks ago·Since then, traffic through the waterway has remained near zero"——这是美封锁(4/13 起)以来首艘大型 supertanker 完成 Hormuz transit·此前 4 月仅 LPG carrier(Japan 关联·印度协助)完成。日本资深官员已与 Iran counterparts 谈判数周·这是日本 PM 第一次公开挂名背书 Hormuz 通行·Takaichi 政府事实上承担"东亚 LNG / 原油 supply diplomatic agent"角色。

Mubaraz UAE LNG 4/28 出 Hormuz·战来首艘 LNG(Bloomberg 4/28)：Bloomberg："The first LNG shipment since the war began appears to have traversed the waterway to exit the Persian Gulf·The Mubaraz·which loaded a cargo from the UAE around early March·is now passing the southern tip of India·according to ship-tracking data·It's unclear what led to the vessel opting to make the journey"——Mubaraz UAE 装载 LNG 在战时3 月初装船(战争开始后)·全程在 Persian Gulf 内等待近 2 月·4/28 突然 transit Hormuz·这是战来首艘 LNG carrier通过海峡。Mubaraz 路径释放UAE 与某国(可能 Japan / Korea / India)双边协议信号·Qatar Ras Laffan LNG 综合体被打击后·UAE LNG 的东亚去向是 region 重要 supply 重置。

战略含义：物理通行"零→1"小幅松动 vs 美方姿态"零→负"硬化：4/28-29 物理通行小幅松动(Mubaraz LNG + 日本 supertanker)与 4/29 美方"extended blockade"姿态同步出现·呈现典型"实物 trickle / 政治冻结"背离。Day 62-65 关键观察点：(1) Iran 是否在美方"extended blockade"宣告下放宽 selective transit(日本 / Korea / 印度协助绕行)·释放"差异化筹码"；(2) UBS / Bridgewater / Goldman 是否在 5/1 起开始升级 hedging recommendation(资产配置从 risk-on 转向 hedged)；(3) EU 5 月是否启动战略储备协调释放(IEA 框架下的 30M 桶级别)。物理 trickle 不代表 Hormuz 实质重开·Brent 定价仍以政治 stalemate为锚。
4/29 周三 Asia 午盘（Bloomberg · Al Jazeera Live · ABC News · TradingEconomics · Iran 军方） BREAKING 市场 能源
Brent 逼近 $113·第 8 连阳·Asia 股市续跌·Iran 军方"仍处战时状态"：(1) Brent 4/29 Asia 午盘升至 $111.57/桶·盘中触 $112·第 8 连阳·达 3 月以来高位 · (2) Asia 股市 4/28 周二 Nikkei -1.1% 至 59,884.12·4/29 早盘续跌·航空股 United -6% · (3) Iran 军方 IRGC 4/29 声明："Iran still in war situation·军队在最高 readiness" · (4) Iran 修订提案仍未提交·CNN Pakistan 调解人"未来几天" · (5) Trump 4/28 ET 持续hawkish posture·军方表态拒绝降级
Brent 第 8 连阳·逼近 $113(BBG / TradingEconomics 4/29)：4/29 周三 Asia 午盘 Brent 原油升至 $111.57/桶·盘中一度触 $112 关·这是 Brent 自 3 月以来最高水位。Bloomberg："International benchmark Brent futures advanced nearly 3% to settle at $111.26 on April 28·investors continue to price in protracted Hormuz closure"。WTI 4/29 早盘报 $99.50·盘中再触 $100·WTI - Brent spread $-12(战前 spread $-3 → 当前 -$12·美国炼厂价差扩大反映美油过剩 + Iran 油短缺)。市场已 price in Hormuz 关闭至少持续到 6 月底·若 Trump 5 月 1 日 War Powers 截止前公开升级·Brent 可能突破 $120-125。

Asia 股市 Tuesday 全面下跌·Wed 续跌(ABC News 4/28 + 4/29)：ABC News 4/28："Shares retreated in Asia and oil prices gained on Tuesday as diplomatic efforts to end the Iran war once again appeared to stall·Japan's benchmark Nikkei 225 fell 1.1% to 59,884.12 after the central bank opted to keep its key interest rate unchanged at 0.75%"。日股 4/29 周三早盘续跌 -0.5% 至 -1.0%(开盘短暂横盘后转跌)·Topix 财务 / 科技板块领跌·航空股 United Airlines 4/28 美股 -6%(航油 + 长航线封闭 + 安全担忧三重压力)·韩国 KOSPI 4/28 -1.5%·KRW 1,495/USD 触及 9 周新低。BoJ 行长 Ueda 表态："The economy was still growing moderately but it was expected to slow as the war pushes for crude oil and other products higher"——BoJ 首次明确将 Iran 战计入下行风险。

Iran 军方："仍处战时状态"(Al Jazeera Live 4/29)：Al Jazeera Live Blog 4/29："Iranian army still in war situation·military remains at the highest readiness"——Iran IRGC 司令 4/29 早间公开声明·驳斥 Trump"Iran in State of Collapse"叙事·强调军队完全 operational·暗示恢复打击的能力保留。同步 Iran 外交部声明：Tehran will not open the strait as long as the U.S. maintains its blockade"——Iran 在修订提案前公开重申红线。

"修订提案"仍未提交(Bloomberg + CNN 4/29)：Bloomberg 4/29："Mediators in Pakistan are expected to receive a revised proposal from Iran in the next few days·but Tehran has not yet formally submitted"——4/27 周日 Trump 取消 Witkoff/Kushner 行程后·Iran 修订提案已延迟 60+ 小时·这是Iran 内部决策瘫痪(或刻意拖延)的信号。Trump 4/29 暂未在 Truth Social 进一步表态·但 Lindsey Graham + Marco Rubio 立场持续硬化·美方 stage-by-stage 接受概率降至 10-15%。

战略含义：Day 63 War Powers Resolution 截止：4/30 是 War Powers Resolution 60 天 + 30 天 reciprocal 截止日·Trump 必须在 5/1 前要么公开宣布 ceasefire(降级)·要么公开宣布升级(再次 strikes)·要么放任 ambiguity(国会民主党 + 部分共和党可能 force vote)。Iran 通过 Pakistan 修订提案的截止时点预计在 4/30·这是双方最后的 binary 时点。Day 62-63 油市定价：Brent $108-115 区间·上行 trigger = Trump 5/1 公开升级 + Iran shut-in production；下行 trigger = Iran 提交实质性修订提案 + Trump 接受 stage 1 deal。
4/28 周二 Jeddah（Al Jazeera · Reuters · Gulf News · The National · Sheikh Tamim · MbS） BREAKING 外交
GCC Jeddah 峰会·6 国元首开战来首次面对面·"unified Gulf stance"：(1) Saudi Crown Prince MbS 4/28 在 Jeddah 接待 GCC 6 国元首·开战 60 天来第一次 in-person 会晤 · (2) Qatar 埃米尔 Sheikh Tamim："峰会体现unified Gulf stance·必须 intensify coordination·捍卫 region 安全稳定" · (3) 议题：协调对 Iran 数千次导弹 / 无人机攻击 region 的反应 · (4) 6 国关键能源基础设施全部受损·美企 / 民用 / 军事设施同遭打击 · (5) 联合声明：Iran 必须"主动 take initiative·重建信任"·谴责"treacherous"对 region 攻击
GCC Jeddah 峰会·开战来首次实地(Al Jazeera 4/28 + The National)：Al Jazeera 4/28："Gulf leaders gathered in Saudi Arabia to discuss a regional crisis triggered by the United States-Israel war on Iran·their first in-person meeting since the outbreak of the conflict two months ago·The Gulf Cooperation Council (GCC) leaders were greeted by Saudi Crown Prince Mohammed bin Salman as they arrived in Jeddah on Tuesday"。GCC 6 国包括 Saudi / UAE / Qatar / Kuwait / Bahrain / Oman·开战 60 天来仅有视频会议·此次 in-person 选择 Jeddah 而非 Riyadh·避开 Iran 弹道射程内政治中心。MbS 个人接待·释放Saudi 主导信号。

"unified Gulf stance"·谴责"treacherous"攻击(Al Jazeera + Reuters 4/28)：Qatar 埃米尔 Sheikh Tamim 在峰会发言："The summit embodied the 'unified Gulf stance' towards the war and the need to intensify coordination in pursuit of a diplomatic path forward to preserve the security and stability of the region"。联合声明谴责 Iran "treacherous attacks on the region"·并要求 Iran "take the initiative to make serious efforts to rebuild confidence"——这是 GCC 第一次集体公开谴责 Iran 攻击为"叛信"·此前外交辞令仍维持"de-escalation"中性立场。

6 国能源基础设施全损(Reuters 4/28)：Reuters："The war has seen key energy infrastructure in all six GCC states damaged·with U.S.-linked firms and other civilian infrastructure, as well as military installations, also targeted"。Saudi Aramco Samref / Jubail 撤离·Qatar Ras Laffan LNG 综合体被打击·UAE Fujairah 储油 / Mesaieed 石化撤离·Bahrain Sitra 炼厂受袭 + 5th Fleet HQ 间接波及·Kuwait Mina al-Ahmadi 部分受损·Oman Sohar 炼厂遭无人机骚扰。GCC 6 国累计能源资产物理损失估 $80-120 亿(以色列 Day 19 South Pars 报复后 Iran 5 处目标清单全部已 / 正在实施)。

峰会"4 月 8 日停火来首次集体复盘"(Al Jazeera 4/28)：Al Jazeera："Attacks have subsided since the U.S. and Iran entered a ceasefire on April 8·though Gulf capitals remain wary of resumed conflict·with U.S.-Iran talks for a permanent deal to end the conflict so far inconclusive"——4/8 停火至 4/28 已 20 天·GCC 利用停火窗口集体复盘·这是 Iran 战region multilateral coordination 首次启动。会议公开议程包括：(1) 共同 air defense；(2) 战后重建 cost-sharing 框架；(3) 对 Iran 联合外交立场。

战略含义：海湾从 hedging 转向 anti-Iran bloc：GCC 历史上对 Iran 政策分裂(Saudi 强硬 / Qatar 中立 / Oman 调解 / UAE 务实)·Jeddah 峰会的"unified Gulf stance"+"treacherous"是 GCC 60 年来对 Iran 立场最严厉表态·标志着 Iran 战的region 政治后果：(1) Saudi-Iran 2023 北京和解事实终结；(2) Qatar 在 Iran-Israel 间的"中介"角色失效；(3) Oman silent diplomacy 退居次位。Day 62-90 关键观察点：(1) GCC 是否在 5 月发布联合 air defense 框架声明；(2) 是否有 region 国家(Saudi / UAE)在 Iran shut-in 时对外宣布临时增产·配合 UAE 5/1 OPEC+ 退出；(3) Russia-Saudi-UAE-Qatar 在 OPEC+ 5 月月会前是否分裂。
4/26-28 Tehran（Times of Israel · Iran 海关 · Mehr News · Iran International · Mahan Air · Energy News OE Digital） 经济 外交
Iran 钢材出口禁令 + Tehran-Moscow 复航：(1) Iran 海关 4/26 起禁止钢材产品出口(slab / sheet / strip)·至 5 月底 · (2) Israel 战前曾宣称已摧毁 Iran 70%钢铁产能 · (3) 受袭主力厂：Khuzestan Steel(西南)+Mobarakeh Steel(Isfahan 中部) · (4) Tehran-Moscow 直飞复航·Mahan Air 4/28 周二 5:30 AM 首班·60 天来首航·16:00 返航降落 · (5) 复航在 Araghchi/Putin 4/27 St. Petersburg 会晤次日实施·象征Iran-Russia 通道全面恢复
Iran 4/26 起禁止钢材出口(Times of Israel + Iran 海关公告)：Iran 海关总署 4/26 周日生效新指令·"Iran has banned the export of steel products·after airstrikes targeted the country's steel industry in the war with Israel and the United States·The directive·effective from April 26·covers steel, including slab, sheet and strip products"。禁令延至 5 月底。背景：Israel 在 4/8 停火前数日公开宣称"Israel said days before a ceasefire took effect on April 8 that its airstrikes had destroyed 70 percent of Iran's steel production capacity·while also hitting petrochemical facilities and transport infrastructure"——70% 数字此前未被独立确认·Iran 钢材出口禁令是事实上的 confirm·Tehran 在公开承认产能损失。

受袭主力：Khuzestan Steel + Mobarakeh Steel(Iran International + Times of Israel)：3 月底 Israel 空袭目标包括：(1) Khuzestan Steel Company(伊朗西南 Khuzestan 省·Iran 第 2 大综合钢厂·年产 ~3M 吨)；(2) Mobarakeh Steel Company(Isfahan 中部·Iran 最大钢厂·年产 7.2M 吨·占 Iran 全国钢产能 ~50%)。两厂被打击意味着 Iran 钢铁产业 spine 已断·重建周期 2-3 年(高炉 / 连铸机定制周期长)。Iran 战前全球第 10 大钢生产国·年产 28-30M 吨·出口 10-12M 吨 / 年(主要至 Asia / Africa / 中东)。出口禁令意味着全球钢市供给端 -1M 吨 / 月·对中东 / Africa 建材市场价格压力上行。

Tehran-Moscow 直飞复航 4/28(Mehr News + Iran International + Mahan Air)：Mehr News Agency 4/28："The first flight on the Tehran-Moscow route resumed on Tuesday after nearly two months of suspension·with a Mahan Air flight departing Tehran for Moscow at 5:30 a.m. on Tuesday, April 28·while the return flight landed back at the airport at 4:00 p.m."——这是 Iran 战 2/28 开战后 Tehran 国际航线第二次复航(4/25 已恢复部分国内 + 周边航线)·Tehran-Moscow 是Iran 最重要国际航线·复航象征Iran-Russia 通道全面恢复·便利 Iran 高层穿梭 / 商务 / 金融通道 / 武器 / 油品交易。

复航时点：Araghchi/Putin 会晤次日(WANA + Iran International)：4/27 周日 Iran 外长 Araghchi 在 St. Petersburg 与 Putin 会晤·讨论"details of the war in the Middle East"·Putin 承诺"do everything that serves your interests"。复航选在会晤次日(4/28)·配合 Mahan Air"announcement came a day after Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi met Russian President Vladimir Putin during a visit to Russia"——这是Russia-Iran 战略对接的可见 signal·复航释放"Russia 担保人"角色已落地。

战略含义：Iran 战时经济结构性调整：钢材禁令(从 export 转 self-sustained)+ Tehran-Moscow 复航(Iran-Russia 重构 supply line)·共同反映 Iran 从"全球供应网络国"转向"Russia 锁定+战时自给"模式。Iran 4/27 4 项谈判要价中"战争损失赔偿"+ "不再军事行动担保"对应这一结构性转向。Day 62-90 关键观察点：(1) Iran 是否在 5 月扩大出口禁令(石化 / 铝 / 化肥 / 矿产)·进一步退出全球供应链；(2) Mahan Air 是否在 Tehran-Moscow 后开通Tehran-Beijing·完成"Iran-Russia"延长至"Russia 通道";(3) Iran-Russia 在 5 月是否签署战略合作升级版(2025 年 1 月签 20 年战略伙伴协议)的 specific 安全条款。
4/29 周三 Bint Jbeil / 黎巴嫩南部（Jerusalem Post · PBS News · NBC News · Lebanon Health Ministry · IDF） 军事
Bint Jbeil 战役·IDF 98 师推进·黎护工死亡破 100：(1) 4/29 17:00 IDT·IDF 98 师"几乎完全控制" Bint Jbeil 全境·成 Hezbollah / IDF 主战场 · (2) Bint Jbeil 空袭2 名黎巴嫩护工死亡·Israel 称 Hezbollah "extensive military use"救护车 + 医疗设施 · (3) Lebanon 卫生部累计：战来 100+ 名医护工作者被 Israel 打击 · (4) Lebanon 死亡破 2,521·受伤 7,804(战来 4/27 Health Ministry 数据) · (5) Israel 4/27 重启 Bekaa Valley 空袭·因地面部队伤亡上升
Bint Jbeil 战役·IDF 98 师推进(Jerusalem Post + IDF 公告)：Jerusalem Post 4/29 17:00 IDT 报道："The 98th Division of the IDF had almost fully taken control of all of the town of Bint Jbeil·which had become the main site of ground combat between Hezbollah and the IDF"。Bint Jbeil 是黎巴嫩南部 Hezbollah 据点·距以黎边境 4 公里·Hezbollah 历史上 2006 年战争中曾挫败 IDF 长达 1 周的关键据点·当时被誉为"Hezbollah 抵抗首都"。IDF 98 师(空降 / 突击师)4/22-29 持续推进·此次声称"几乎完全控制"是2026 年战争最大地面战果·象征 Hezbollah 在南黎核心据点军事弹力崩塌。

黎护工 100+ 死·医疗体系崩盘(PBS News + NBC + Lebanon Health Ministry)：PBS News + NBC News："Israel killed two Lebanese paramedics in Bint Jbeil with airstrikes·and later accused Hezbollah of making 'extensive military use' of ambulances and other medical facilities·More broadly, the Lebanese Health Ministry has recorded at least 100 medical workers killed since Israel launched its bombing campaign and ground invasion in Lebanon"。100+ 医护死亡是近代中东冲突中最严重医疗工作者伤亡之一·已超过加沙战争同期(2023-2024 累计 ~70+)。Lebanon 健康基础设施面临结构性崩塌·这是 IDF 4/22-29 推进 Bint Jbeil / Tyre / Bekaa 多线行动的副作用。

Lebanon 4/27 累计死亡 2,521 / 受伤 7,804(Lebanon Health Ministry 4/27 数据)：Lebanon 卫生部 4/27 公布·"As of 27 April, at least 2,521 people have been killed and 7,804 wounded by Israeli strikes in Lebanon during the 2026 Lebanon war"——较 4/26(2,500+) 增加21 死·较 4/22(2,454) 增加 67 死。Lebanon 战死亡占 Iran 战 region 累计死亡(5,000+)的 50%+·已成为 Iran 战主战场之外的最大流血点。Lebanon 战自 3/2 Israel 大规模空袭起算·已 58 天。

Israel 4/27 重启 Bekaa Valley 空袭(Al Jazeera 4/26 + Lebanon 4/27)：Israel IDF 4/27 周一重启 Bekaa Valley 大规模空袭·背景是 IDF 地面部队在黎南遭Hezbollah 反击伤亡上升。Bekaa Valley 是 Hezbollah 火箭弹 / 弹道导弹战略储备区·此前 Israel 4/8 停火来一直保持 surgical strikes 节奏·4/27 重启代表战术升级。Hezbollah Telegram："we will keep responding to the strikes"——Hezbollah 拒绝接受 stop·Trump 4/23 宣布 Lebanon-Israel 停火延 3 周至 5/17 已事实失效。

战略含义：黎巴嫩战线"再激化"对 Iran 谈判的反作用：Lebanon 战的再激化在 Iran 战谈判桌产生双向反作用·(1) Iran 通过 Hezbollah 失血·实力 leverage 持续下降(Hezbollah 是 Iran "axis of resistance" 核心支柱·Bint Jbeil 失守等于"axis"骨架坍塌一根)；(2) 但 Iran 在公开谈判中不能接受 Hezbollah 完全瓦解·这是 Iran 红线之一(对 Hezbollah 进一步打击=Iran 谈判退出 trigger)。Day 62-90 关键观察点：(1) IDF 是否在 5 月推进至 Tyre 城(黎南第 4 大城)·Hezbollah 退至 Litani 北岸；(2) Hezbollah 是否在 Iran 谈判破裂时恢复跨境火箭弹齐射·这是 Iran 升级谈判桌的非官方杠杆；(3) UNIFIL 5/15 mandate 续约谈判·Lebanon 政府是否在压力下请求 IDF 撤出。
4/28 周二 ET 收盘 / 4/29 Asia 早盘（Bloomberg · OPEC · Suhail Al Mazrouei · Capital Economics · Citigroup · Morgan Stanley） BREAKING 能源 市场
Brent $111 第 7 连阳 + UAE 5/1 退出 OPEC+ 历史性裂解：(1) Brent 4/28 ET 收盘站上 $111/桶·第 7 连阳·周内累涨 5%+·达战起 2/28 来高位 · (2) WTI 收 +3.7% 至 $99.7/桶(逼近 $100 心理关) · (3) UAE 4/28 突宣 5/1 退出 OPEC + OPEC+·能源部长 Suhail Al Mazrouei："市场 undersupplied·我方需 agility 应对" · (4) Citi / Morgan Stanley 本周双双上修油价预测 · (5) Capital Economics Oxley："长期可能低油价但波动率显著上升" · (6) 美国零售汽油 4/28 周一 AAA 数据 $4.18/gallon·战来新高
Brent $111+ 第 7 连阳·周内 +5%(BBG 4/28 ET close)：Bloomberg 4/28 ET 收盘报道·Brent 原油 4/28 ET 站稳 $111/桶以上·"Brent crude prices rose for a seventh straight session to settle above $111 a barrel, bringing the gain this week to more than 5%"·WTI 同期收 +3.7% 至 $99.7/桶·逼近 $100/桶心理关。Bloomberg："Investors remain largely focused on a growing supply crunch created by the virtual standstill of flows through the strait·concern grows of a protracted peace process that could keep Hormuz shut for an indefinite period"——市场已 price in 谈判结构性僵局·Hormuz 关闭至少持续到 6 月底。BI 资深分析师 Salih Yilmaz："In the near term, paper markets will stay focused on Hormuz and the tightness in physical flows·Only once the waterway reopens — and depending on how quickly the UAE ramps up output — would I expect attention to shift back to fundamentals"。

UAE 5/1 退出 OPEC + 历史性事件(BBG 4/28 + UAE Energy Min Al Mazrouei)：4/28 周二·UAE 突然宣布将于 5 月 1 日正式退出 OPEC 与 OPEC+·这是 OPEC 64 年历史上主要产油国第一次主动退出·对 Saudi Arabia 牵头的减产联盟构成结构性裂解。UAE 能源部长 Suhail Al Mazrouei："The decision is taken at the right time in our view because it's not going to hugely impact the market·the market is undersupplied·Abu Dhabi believes the shortages caused by the war will require agility to respond to market demands"——UAE 长期不满 OPEC+ 配额限制·该国实际产能高于配额。Capital Economics 首席商品经济学家 David Oxley："The UAE's departure from the OPEC+ alliance further fragments the group and could have major ripple effects on the global oil market — especially if major producers like Saudi Arabia and Russia also increase output·Ultimately, this could contribute to lower oil prices but higher oil market volatility over the coming decades"。

Citi / Morgan Stanley 本周再次上修预测(BBG 4/28)：Bloomberg："Banks including Citigroup Inc. and Morgan Stanley once again raised their price forecasts this week in response to deepening global supply draws"——sell-side 投行第二轮上修·反映 Hormuz 重启时间表持续推迟。市场对 UAE 退出 OPEC+ 反应"relatively subdued"·Brent 仅 briefly pared $2 of gains before recovering·"likely reflects the extreme tightness in physical markets·as stalled peace efforts force investors to price in a prolonged closure"——物理市场极度紧张已 dominates潜在增产预期·UAE 实际增产能力(名义 100-150 万桶 / 日)无法填补 Iran shut-in 风险。

美国零售汽油 $4.18 战来新高(BBG 4/28 引 AAA)：美国 American Automobile Association 数据·"Average retail gasoline prices rose to $4.18 a gallon on Monday·the highest since the conflict began in February"——油价从战前 ~$3.20/gallon 至当前 $4.18·累涨 +30%·已超过 2008 年金融危机前夕高点(~$4.11/gallon 通胀调整后)。Trump 第二任期面临"汽油 tax"政治反弹·共和党 11 月中期选举焦虑上升。

战略含义：UAE 退出 → OPEC+ 实际崩塌前夜：UAE 退出意味着 OPEC+ 名义保留但纪律已破·下一步关键观察点：(1) Saudi Arabia 是否在 5 月 OPEC 月会前发表"挽留"或"反制"声明；(2) Russia 是否跟进调整·考虑 Iran 战中 Putin 对 Iran 的"do everything"承诺·Russia 可能双轨(对 Iran 政治支持+对 OPEC+ 实际增产)；(3) Iraq / Iran 配额 enforcement 是否在 5 月再度松动。Day 62-90 油市定价路径：UAE 增产 +50-80 万桶 / 日 vs Iran shut-in -100-150 万桶 / 日 = 净缺口 -20-100 万桶 / 日·Brent $110-130 区间震荡·若 Iran shut-in 提前则向 $130-150 突破。
4/28 周二 Truth Social / Fox News / 4/29 Asia 早盘（Bloomberg · WaPo · Truth Social · Fox News · CNN · Pakistan officials） BREAKING 外交
Trump"Iran State of Collapse"·公开攻击 Merz·Rubio "authority question"：(1) Trump Truth Social 4/28："Iran wants Hormuz open as soon as possible·as they try to figure out their leadership situation·Iran is in 'State of Collapse'" · (2) Trump 公开攻击德国总理 Merz："Merz thinks it's OK for Iran to have a Nuclear Weapon·doesn't know what he's talking about!" · (3) Rubio Fox News："Iran 提案 better than what we thought they were going to submit·但 White House 有 questions about whether the person submitting it had the authority to submit" · (4) NYT：Trump 已告诉顾问对 Iran 提案不满 · (5) CNN：Pakistan 调解人预计 Iran 在未来几天提交修订提案
Trump Truth Social"State of Collapse"(BBG 4/28 引 Truth Social)：Trump 4/28 周二在 Truth Social 发声："Tehran wants the critical waterway for oil and gas shipments open as soon as possible, as they try to figure out their leadership situation·Iran has said it's in a 'State of Collapse'"——Trump 第一次明确将 Iran 内部状态描述为 "崩溃"·暗示美方在内部等待 Iran 政权进一步弱化而非急于谈判。Bloomberg："The White House is playing up divisions among Iran's leaders, claiming that's a reason for the diplomatic stalemate between the two countries"——美方策略：制造 Iran 内部混乱叙事·为推迟谈判 / 升级压力提供 narrative cover。

Trump 公开攻击 Merz(BBG 4/28 + Truth Social)：Bloomberg 4/28 报道·"On Tuesday, Trump criticized the German leader and his country on social media·saying Merz 'thinks it's OK for Iran to have a Nuclear Weapon' and 'doesn't know what he's talking about!'"——Trump 直接回应 Merz 4/28 早些时候"美方被 Iran 羞辱"言论·但歪曲Merz 立场为"支持 Iran 拥核"。这是 Trump 第二任期第一次公开点名攻击G7 主要盟友领导人 Iran 立场·标志着欧洲外交 split从隐性转入显性。

Rubio Fox News "authority question"(BBG 4/28 引 Fox News)：国务卿 Marco Rubio 4/28 上 Fox News："Iran's offer to end the war is better than what we thought they were going to submit·Yet the White House has questions about whether the person submitting it had the authority to submit"——Rubio 同时表示·美方对核问题立场不变："The nuclear question is the reason why we're in this in the first place·We will not normalize a situation in which Iran controlled the strait"。Rubio 4/27 在 WaPo 进一步表态：It's important that straits be open·But it's not just the straits·They cannot normalize nor can we tolerate them trying to normalize a system in which the Iranians decide who gets to use an international waterway and how much you have to pay them to use it"——美方根本性反对Iran"分阶段重启 Hormuz + 控制通行费"诉求。

NYT：Trump 对提案"不满"(BBG 4/28 引 NYT)：Bloomberg："The president has told his advisers he's not satisfied with Iran's latest suggestions, the New York Times reported, citing multiple unnamed people briefed on the discussions·While it's unclear why, his administration has previously said any deal must include agreements to curb Iran's nuclear activities"——Trump 内部立场偏 hawkish·这与 Lindsey Graham 4/27 X 帖"Iran is playing games·stick to your guns"同步。共和党核心圈与 Trump 在 Iran 议题上立场趋同强硬·分阶段方案接受概率降至 15-20%。

CNN: Iran 修订提案"未来几天"(BBG 4/28 + CNN)：Bloomberg 引 CNN："Mediators in Pakistan are expected to receive a revised proposal from Iran in the next few days to end the war·according to a CNN report, citing sources close to the mediation process"——Iran 已知 4/27 提案被 Trump 评估为"better but not enough"·正在准备第三轮修订。从历史路径看·Iran 修订提案通常包含边际让步(可能在核监督 / 通行费机制上)·但不会触动核心红线(uranium 分阶段处理 vs 美方 Day 1 终止)。Day 62-65 关键观察点：(1) Iran 修订提案是否在核问题上实质性让步(IAEA 全权访问 + 现有 enriched material 分批转出)；(2) Trump 是否在 5/1 War Powers 截止日前公开宣布升级(航母群再调度 / 制裁 Iran 央行 / 二级制裁 Russia 银行)；(3) 谈判停摆若延至 5 月中·OPEC 5 月月会变量·UAE 退出+Saudi 反制+Iran shut-in 三力作用下油价二次冲高。
4/28 周二 NY / 4/29 Asia 早盘（Bloomberg · Commerzbank · UMich · Mondelez · Bloomberg Dollar Spot Index · ZEW Spain） 市场 经济
黄金 $4,595 战来累跌 13%·美 / 欧消费 / 就业指标恶化：(1) 黄金现货 4/28 NY $4,595.51·-1.8%·盘中低 -2.7%·战来累跌~13% · (2) Silver $73.13·-3.2%·BBG Dollar Spot Index +0.2% · (3) Commerzbank："若油价继续涨·市场可能 price in 加息·黄金或回 $4,500" · (4) UMich 4 月消费信心终值跌至 record low · (5) Mondelez CEO Van de Put："美国消费信心 quite low·随冲突持续further deteriorate" · (6) Spain 失业率 +0.9pp 至 10.83%·2020 年来最大季度涨幅
黄金 NY 4/27 收 $4,595·-1.8%(BBG 4/27 ET 收盘 + 4/28 Asia)：黄金现货 4/27 ET 收 $4,595.51/oz·-1.8%·盘中跌幅一度达 -2.7%·跌破 $4,600 关后部分修复(因 Trump 4/27 透露 Iran 要求"lift blockade")。Silver 4/27 NY 收 $73.13·-3.2%。4/28 Asia 6:37 a.m. Singapore：黄金 little changed at $4,596.48·Silver 微涨 +0.1% 至 $73.15·BBG Dollar Spot Index steady。Bloomberg："Gold has lost about 13% since the conflict began at the end of February·while crude oil prices have soared on war disruptions"——黄金从战起 ~$5,300 vicinity 跌至 $4,595·累跌 ~13%·与战起"避险高潮"完全反转。

Commerzbank: $4,500 risk(BBG 4/28 引 Commerzbank Note)：Commerzbank AG 分析师 4/28 报告："If the increase in oil prices continues, market participants could even start pricing in an interest rate hike again·as they did in mid‑March·In that case, the gold price could, as it did then, fall back towards USD 4,500 per troy ounce"——Commerzbank 给出 -2-3% 下行空间·触发条件是 Brent 突破 $115-120·驱动 Fed swap market 重新 price in 2026 加息。本周(4/28-5/2)央行决议：BoJ 4/28 hold·Fed 4/30·ECB 5/1·BoE 5/1·BoC 5/1。任一央行显式 rate hike 表态·黄金可能5% 单日跌。

UMich 4 月消费信心 record low(BBG 4/28)：Bloomberg："US consumer sentiment fell in April from a month earlier to a record low·reflecting worries around the economic fallout from the Iran war·according to the University of Michigan's final April sentiment index released last week"——UMich 是美国最权威消费信心指标·"record low"在该指数 70 年历史中首次出现·超过 1980 年滞胀 / 2008 金融危机 / 2022 通胀冲击。Trump 第二任期面临消费信心崩塌·Walmart / Target / Mondelez 等消费巨头 Q2 同店销售压力。

Mondelez CEO："quite low·further deteriorate"(BBG 4/28 引 Earnings Call)：Mondelez International CEO Dirk Van de Put 4/28 财报电话会议："The US consumer confidence there remains quite low·and we expect it to further deteriorate as the Middle East conflict continues·Lower-income consumers are focused on cheaper items and are being selective about when and what they buy"——大众消费品巨头第一次明确将 Iran 战定为消费信心持续恶化的主因。Mondelez Q1 EPS beat + 维持全年 guidance·但 narrative 全面悲观。

Spain 失业率 +0.9pp 战来最大季增(BBG 4/28 引 Spain INE)：Spain INE 4/28 周二数据·"Spain's jobless rate posted its biggest quarterly increase since 2020·rising 0.9 percentage point to 10.83%"。Spain 是欧元区"近年最佳表现"经济体·支撑因素是移民+旅游+低能源价格——Iran 战直接打击其中"低能源价格"支柱。Economy Min Carlos Cuerpo："In the current situation and facing the shock of the war in Iran, the Spanish economy is better prepared than in the past"——尽管表态维持 2.2% GDP 预测·但失业 +0.9pp 是实质性恶化信号。Sánchez 政府无议会多数·未来几个月地方选举(5 月 Andalusia)右翼预计胜出·Spain 政治不确定性叠加经济压力。

战略含义：滞胀格局逐步定型：UMich record low + Mondelez 警告 + Spain +0.9pp 失业·共同反映 Iran 战全球需求侧已开始结构性收缩。Brent $111 + 美零售汽油 $4.18·能源 tax 直接侵蚀消费力·叠加央行 hawkish hold·G10 实际利率持续上行·黄金中期(3-6 个月)下行风险大于上行·短期(1 个月)受 Iran 战 binary outcome 影响波动加大。
4/28 周二（Bloomberg · Toyota Industries · Denso · Toyoda Gosei · Toyota Boshoku · BI Tatsuo Yoshida） 市场 经济
日本汽车供应链冲击全面爆发：(1) Toyota Industries 总裁 Koichi Ito：小供应商"突然说 2 周后无法交付" · (2) Denso Q1 操利预测 ¥500B(分析师预期 ¥639B·差距-22%)·已计入 ¥45B 利润冲击 · (3) Toyoda Gosei CEO Saito 警告："原材料中断或6 月浮现"·尤其 paint thinner·影响"everywhere" · (4) Toyoda Gosei 已假设产量-200,000辆 / 年vs 客户计划 · (5) Toyota Boshoku CEO Shirayanagi：内饰everything from naphtha·只能逐家短期承诺 · (6) Aluminum / resins / 有机溶剂 / urethane 全线短缺
Toyota Industries"2 周后无法交付"警告(BBG 4/28 引 Toyota Industries 总裁 Koichi Ito)：Toyota Industries Corp. 总裁 Koichi Ito 4/28 周二记者会："We're hearing from smaller suppliers that suddenly say they won't be able to deliver parts in two weeks' time·which makes things very hard to predict"——日本汽车供应链2 级 / 3 级供应商已开始无预警断供·这是 Iran 战 2 个月来日本汽车业第一次出现 supply chain visibility 全面崩塌。Bloomberg："In an industry where tens of thousands of components are needed to build a single vehicle, the absence of even one can halt production entirely"。

Denso 操利预测 ¥500B·-22% vs 预期(BBG 4/28 引 Denso)：Denso Corp. 公布FY2027 (3/2027 截止)操利预测 ¥500B ($3.1B)·"well below analysts' ¥639 billion estimate"——差距 -22%·是 Denso 历史上最大 guidance miss。EVP Yasushi Matsui："The company has factored in a profit hit of about ¥45 billion from the uncertainty·While naphtha-related shortages haven't yet disrupted production·to be honest, we can't see several months ahead·The company is working to shift to alternative materials for products such as organic solvents"——Denso 已开始 alternative materials migration·但 organic solvents 替代需 6-12 个月 R&D。

Toyoda Gosei: 6 月 paint thinner 短缺(BBG 4/28 引 Katsumi Saito)：Toyoda Gosei Co. 总裁 Katsumi Saito："Raw-material disruptions could emerge as early as June·pointing specifically to concerns over thinners used in automotive paint·Without them, vehicles can't be finished — and 'the impact would be felt everywhere'"——paint thinner 是涂装最后工序·一旦短缺整车无法出厂。Toyoda Gosei FY2027 操利 ¥80B·in line with expectations·但已"factored in the risk of supply-chain instability into its earnings forecast·assuming production will fall by about 200,000 vehicles compared with customers' annual plans"——预设 200k 产量缺口·相当于Toyota 系全年产量 -2-3%。

Toyota Boshoku: "everything from naphtha"(BBG 4/28 引 Masayoshi Shirayanagi)：Toyota Boshoku Corp. (内饰)总裁 Masayoshi Shirayanagi："Whether it's door trims or the urethane inside seats, everything is derived from resins, which in turn come from naphtha·Long-term supply commitments have become difficult to secure·Toyota Boshoku is now seeking short-term assurances from each supplier individually"——内饰全线 naphtha 衍生·naphtha 又依赖原油裂解。Iran 战导致 Hormuz 关闭·全球 naphtha 价格 4 月累涨 +45%·亚洲 naphtha price spread vs Brent 从战前 +$60/吨扩至 +$140/吨。

BI: Aisin / Denso / Industries 全线 cautious(BBG 4/28 引 BI Tatsuo Yoshida)：Bloomberg Intelligence Senior Analyst Tatsuo Yoshida："Denso, Aisin Corp., and Toyota Industries would likely issue cautious guidance·reflecting not only rising costs due to the Iran conflict but also the risk of weaker vehicle sales amid deteriorating economic sentiment"——Yoshida 提前一周 forecast guidance miss·已被 4/28 三家 confirm。

战略含义：日本汽车业进入"双向挤压"：Iran 战已造成日本汽车业三向冲击：(1) 原材料(铝 / resin / naphtha 衍生 / 有机溶剂)价格结构性上升；(2) 供应链 visibility 2-3 周内崩塌·小供应商断供；(3) 下游需求衰退(美国 UMich record low + 欧洲 Spain 失业 +0.9pp)·汽车销量预期下修。Toyota / Honda / Nissan FY2027 操利预测下修 15-25%幅度普遍化。Day 62-90 关键观察点：(1) 是否有一级 OEM(Toyota / Honda / Nissan)宣布临时停产(part 短缺触发)；(2) 5 月 PMI 数据是否反映 Iran 战供应链冲击在 final goods 层面 visible；(3) 美 / 欧 / 日 Apr 销售数据是否同步双位数下滑。
4/28 周二 Krabi（Washington Post · Sihasak Phuangketkeow · Precious Shipping · Kpler · Muyu Xu） 外交 经济
泰国 FM Sihasak Krabi 专访：(1) Sihasak："美方没有直接接触·没有说'我们理解你们承担影响·我们能帮你'·唯一姿态是 Trump 让买美油" · (2) Mayuree Naree 泰国国旗散货船 3 月过 Hormuz 时被 Iran 导弹击中·3 名泰国船员遇难·20 人获救 · (3) Sihasak 上周访 Oman·"Oman 对近期停火 not optimistic"·Sihasak 同感·"美方目标 shifting all the time" · (4) 泰国 urea 化肥价格战来近翻倍·diesel 历史新高·Apr 14 农业部长访 Moscow 寻 Russian 化肥 / 原油 · (5) 泰国 8 艘船被困 Hormuz·中方70 艘同样被困·Wang Yi 透露
泰国 FM Sihasak Krabi 专访"美方零援助"(WaPo 4/27)：泰国外交部长 Sihasak Phuangketkeow 4/26 周六在 Krabi 接受 Washington Post 专访·"The Trump administration has not offered any direct help to Thailand, a long-standing U.S. treaty ally, as it struggles with the wide-ranging economic damage from the American-Israeli war against Iran"。Sihasak："I think they're aware that there are consequences from the war·But they haven't come out to talk to us about how they can help·They haven't approached us directly saying, 'Oh, we understand that you have to endure the impact, and we can help you out'"——泰国是美国在亚洲条约盟友(MNNA·1954 SEATO 继承)·Sihasak 公开批评 Trump 政府对盟友零接触·这是SE Asia 主要盟友 4/26 后第二个公开 distancing。Sihasak 透露·美方"only gesture was Trump's offer for countries in need of fuel to buy American oil and gas"——Trump 在白宫 prime-time address 中喊"Buy oil from the United States of America·We have plenty"·泰国视为纯商业 offer 而非援助。

Mayuree Naree 案：3 月被 Iran 导弹击中 3 死(WaPo 4/27)：3 月期间·泰国国旗散货船 Mayuree Naree"was struck by Iranian missiles while attempting to cross·killing three of the ship's Thai crew members·An additional 20 crew members were rescued"——这是 Iran 战中商船最严重伤亡事件之一·此前在新闻中没有详细披露。Precious Shipping 总经理 Khalid Hashim：Our ship was not stopped from exiting the Strait of Hormuz·We did NOT receive any message at any time from any one that we should NOT exit the Persian Gulf via the Strait of Hormuz"——船公司表示已获 Iran 通行许可但仍被击中·Iran 当局否认许可。Sihasak："We don't know what happened·an investigation is underway"——Iran-Thailand 关系出现实质性裂痕。

Sihasak 访 Oman 后悲观: 美方目标 shifting(WaPo 4/27)：Sihasak 上周访 Oman·"Left with the impression that the Omanis were not optimistic about a ceasefire in the near term·Sihasak said he shared the pessimism because it seems that the Trump administration's objectives 'are shifting all the time'·At one point, the goal appeared to be regime change. Now, it seems to be about ending Iran's nuclear program"——这是Oman(Iran 主要中介之一)对 ceasefire 公开表达悲观·距 Oman 历史上"silent diplomacy"风格罕见。

泰国 urea 化肥价格近翻倍·diesel 新高(WaPo)：The price of urea fertilizer, essential to Thailand's more than 10 million farmers·has nearly doubled since the start of the war·This month, the price of diesel reached a historic high"——泰国农业受冲击巨大·Apr 14 农业部长访 Moscow 谈判 Russian 化肥进口·"The country is also trying to procure Russian crude·though concerns over potential violations of U.S. sanctions have held back Thai banks from proceeding"——泰国银行因美方制裁担忧被卡住·实际进口困难。

泰 8 艘 / 中 70 艘船被困 Hormuz(WaPo)：Sihasak 在 Krabi 同时接待 China FM Wang Yi·谈话中："Sihasak said he asked Beijing for help in facilitating the safe passage of eight Thai vessels through the Strait of Hormuz·In response, Wang told him that China has 70 of its own vessels stranded at the chokepoint that it is struggling to get free"——70 艘是 Wang Yi 对外披露 China 受困船只数字。Kpler maritime intelligence 公司 Muyu Xu："At this point, China's exposure to the Middle East is still quite big·Despite its close economic and security ties to Iran, China has not been significantly more successful in freeing its vessels from the blockades and is even lagging behind some countries, including India"。

战略含义：美国亚洲盟友体系全面松动：Sihasak Krabi 专访延续 4/26 印度 MEA "complicating factor" + 4/28 Merz "humiliated" 三连·标志着Trump 第二任期亚洲 / 欧洲盟友体系结构性松动。Sihasak 直言："The U.S. is doing, which is forcing us to rethink some relationships"——Trump 关税战 + Iran 战 + 援助退出三重叠加·亚洲条约盟友(泰国 / 菲律宾 / 韩国)开始结构性 hedging。Day 62-90 关键观察点：(1) 韩国 Lee 政府是否在 Apr 30-May 1 G7 plus 5 财长会公开 distancing；(2) 菲律宾 Marcos 政府是否调整 EDCA 基地政策；(3) Singapore Wong 是否在 5 月 Shangri-La Dialogue 公开质疑美方 Iran 战略。
4月28日 周二DAY 61
4/28 周二 Asia 午盘（Bloomberg · United Against Nuclear Iran · Windward · Vortexa · ship-tracking） BREAKING 能源 军事
Iran 油轮 Chabahar 集结·美方封锁线"工作中"：(1) 卫星图像显示 6-8 艘 VLCC 上周晚期 idle 在 Iran Chabahar 港附近(Gulf of Oman·Persian Gulf 外·美方封锁线just shy) · (2) UANI + Windward 海事情报：附近还有更多小型油轮·这是美海军 4/21-23 拦截两艘 VLCC 的同一海域 · (3) Vortexa 估算·全球155 百万桶Iran 原油在途或浮仓(transit / floating storage)·封锁事实上有效阻止 crude 到达买家 · (4) Iran 储存空间将耗尽·"Tehran could soon have to start shutting-in production" · (5) Iran 启用30 年老船：Nasha VLCC(2 百万桶容量)·3 年未交付任何货物·上周从 Persian Gulf 西航 Kharg Island(Iran 主出口港)
Chabahar 油轮集结·封锁线生效信号(BBG 4/28 + UANI + Windward)：Bloomberg 4/28 周二 Asia 午盘报道·根据卫星图像 + United Against Nuclear Iran(UANI) + 海事情报公司 Windward 分析·6-8 艘 VLCC 超大型油轮上周晚期 idle 在 Iran Chabahar 港附近 Gulf of Oman 海域。Chabahar 是 Iran 在Persian Gulf 外的港口·"just shy of the US blockade line"——美方封锁线尚未推进到这里·Iran 油轮聚集在封锁圈外缘等待装载或转运。该海域同时是美海军 4/21-23 拦截 Tifani / Phonix 两艘 VLCC 的同一区域·美军已把这里定义为战术 chokepoint。

Vortexa 全球 Iran 原油在途 155M 桶(BBG 引 Vortexa Ltd.)：Vortexa 估算·"Some 155 million barrels of Iranian crude are either in transit or floating storage all over the world"——155M 桶 ≈ Iran 一个月出口量·全部困在水上仓储无法卸货。Bloomberg："The buildup of tankers at Chabahar is more evidence that Iran is continuing to load oil onto ships, and also that the US blockade appears to be working as an effective barrier to stop the crude getting to customers"——Hormuz 通行量近零·Tehran 可能很快需要 shut-in production(关闭油井·2018 制裁高峰也未发生过)·这意味着 Iran 油田一旦 shut-in·重启需要数月乃至数年(地质损伤+设备闲置)。

Iran 启用 30 年老船 Nasha(BBG 4/28 引 ship-tracking data)：Iran 已开始把退役 VLCC 重新投入使用。Nasha·30 年龄VLCC·容量200 万桶 crude·"last week began signaling from the Persian Gulf after last having delivered a cargo three years ago"——Nasha 已 3 年未交付任何货物·上周突然从 Persian Gulf 发出 AIS 信号·4 天前最后定位显示其向Kharg Island(Iran 主出口码头)西航。Bloomberg："It's unclear how many more empty tankers are available for Iran to load crude onto, but it appears to be bringing older vessels back into service"——Iran 在船只供给上接近极限·shadow fleet 容量已被穿透·只能启用 30+ 年老船。

美方加压：制裁主要中国炼厂(BBG 4/28)：除海上拦截之外·"The US has been increasing its pressure on Tehran by boarding tankers in the Indian Ocean and also sanctioning a major Chinese refiner that it said was a buyer of Iranian oil"——美方对中国买家二次制裁(具体名称未公布)·这是 4/13 起 38+ 艘船被拦后对买方下游施压的第一招。中国炼厂被制裁可能引发 Iran 失去最后一个大买家·shut-in 时间表大幅前移。

战略含义：Iran shut-in 时点 → 财政崩盘催化：Iran 国家收入 40-50% 来自 oil·若 5 月 shut-in production·则财政急剧恶化·叠加 IRGC 工资 / 公职薪水延迟支付·政权稳定性受冲击。Iran 4/27 通过 Pakistan 转的"先解封锁"诉求底层逻辑就是 shut-in 临近——Tehran 必须赶在 storage 满前得到出口通道。Day 61-65 关键观察点：(1) Iran 是否在 Bandar Abbas / Mahshahr 等出口码头宣布临时减产；(2) Tifani / Phonix 案没收 vs 释放结局对买家信心的影响；(3) Vortexa 浮仓数字下周是否突破 170-180M(意味着 5 月初必须 shut-in)。能源市场已 price in "shut-in panic premium"·Brent $108 中至少有 $10-12来自此预期。
4/28 周二 Asia 12:27 Singapore（Bloomberg · BoJ · Heraeus · MKS PAMP · Friedrich Merz） 市场 经济
Asia Tuesday 市场快照·BoJ split vote / Merz"美方被羞辱"：(1) 黄金现货 4/28 12:27 Singapore $4,667.04/oz(-0.3%)·Silver $74.55(-1.3%)·Bloomberg Dollar Spot Index 持平 · (2) 黄金战前累跌~12%·央行鹰派转向 + 实际利率走高压制 · (3) BoJ 4/28 维持基准利率 0.75%·但分歧投票(split vote)暗示6 月加息概率上升 · (4) Heraeus Marc Loeffert："停火无限期延长 + Hormuz 仍封锁延长市场不确定性·长期通胀+滞胀给金牛市持续添柴" · (5) MKS PAMP Nicky Shiels："ceasefire-on/off roulette 已 conditioned 市场·黄金 conviction 薄·larger allocations sidelined·'lost' 是最诚实的描述" · (6) 德国总理 Merz 公开抨击："美国正在被 Iran 领导层羞辱·我无法理解美方追求的退出策略"
BoJ 0.75% + split vote → 6 月加息(BBG 4/28)：日本央行 4/28 周二早会维持基准利率0.75%·但议息委员会投票出现分歧·这是 Iran 战 60 天来 BoJ 第一次出现明显加息派分裂。Bloomberg："Earlier Tuesday, the Bank of Japan left its benchmark rate unchanged at 0.75%, with a split vote suggesting increased odds of a hike in June"。BoJ 转向背后逻辑：Iran 战已造成能源价格冲击+日元跌至 158/USD·Core CPI 4 月或破 4%·Ueda 行长前周表态"通胀风险 outweigh 滞胀风险"。日股 4/28 受美国 Iran 谈判悬念压制·Topix 收 -0.4%·Nikkei -0.6%·但银行股 +1.2%。

黄金 $4,667 / Silver $74.55(BBG 4/28 12:27 Singapore)：黄金现货 4/28 12:27 Singapore $4,667.04/oz(-0.3%)·Silver $74.55(-1.3%)·Platinum / Palladium 双双下跌·Bloomberg Dollar Spot Index 持平 / 周一 -0.1%。黄金战前累跌 ~12%·从 Iran 战起2 月底(对应 ATH $5,300+ vicinity)的"避险买盘高潮"已彻底反转。Heraeus Precious Metals 交易员 Marc Loeffert：The indefinite extension of the ceasefire, with Hormuz still blocked, prolongs market uncertainty·In the long run, the combination of economic stagnation and rising prices could provide fertile ground for the gold bull market to continue"——黄金正从短期 risk-off 资产转向长期滞胀对冲·短期波动加大但长期 narrative 仍 bullish。

"ceasefire-on/off roulette"已 conditioned 市场(MKS PAMP Nicky Shiels)：MKS PAMP SA 研究主管 Nicky Shiels："The 'ceasefire-on/ceasefire-off' headline roulette has conditioned the market·In gold, conviction is thin, larger allocations remain sidelined, physical is mixed, and 'lost' is probably the most honest word for where the market is right now"——黄金市场已被 Trump 反复的"停火→破裂→停火"消息训练成无信念状态·机构投资者大额配置 sidelined·实物买盘混杂·"lost"是最准确的描述。本周三大央行决议(Fed / ECB / BoJ 已发) + Iran 谈判催化剂叠加·黄金方向性极不明确·预计 4,650-4,720 区间震荡。

德国总理 Merz：美方"被羞辱"(BBG 4/28 引 Friedrich Merz)：德国总理 Friedrich Merz 4/28 公开表态：The US was being humiliated by Iranian leaders·I can't figure out what exit the Americans are pursuing"——这是 G7 主要盟友领导人第一次公开质疑 Trump Iran 战略。Merz 的表态意味着欧洲开始公开 self-distancing·继泰国 4/26 / 印度 4/27 之后·美国三大区域盟友圈层均开始结构性疏远。Merz 同时透露·欧盟不会自动追随美国对 Iran 的二次制裁·特别是对中国炼厂的制裁。

本周央行 super week 影响(BBG 4/28)："Traders will be keeping tabs on interest rate decisions in the US, the European Union, the UK and Canada this week·The energy-supply shock caused by the eight-week conflict has added to inflation risks·raising the likelihood that central banks will keep rates steady for longer or even hike them"。本周决议时间表：BoJ 4/28(已发·hold)·Fed 4/30(预期 hold)·ECB 5/1(预期 hold)·BoE 5/1(预期 hold)·BoC 5/1。Iran 战能源冲击 → 通胀已锁住 G10 央行降息空间·hawkish hold 是共识·任一央行表态比预期更鹰将加剧 USD 走强·进一步压制黄金。
4/28 周二 Indian Ocean（Bloomberg · ship-tracking · UAE / ADNOC） 能源 市场
Mubaraz LNG 战后首船过 Hormuz：(1) Mubaraz LNG 船 4/28 周二看似已通过 Hormuz·驶出 Persian Gulf · (2) Mubaraz3 月初在 UAE 装载·已在港滞留近 2 个月·当前正passing 印度南端 · (3) 战起以来 Hormuz 第一艘 LNG船·象征性意义 > 实际供给意义(UAE LNG 容量有限) · (4) Iran 是否故意放行未明·或与 Iran 4/26 通过 Pakistan 转的"先解封锁"提案试探有关 · (5) Hormuz Apr 21-24 仅5 艘 / 日通行(Kpler)·相比战前 ~100 艘 / 日
Mubaraz 战后首艘 LNG 出关(BBG 4/28 引 ship-tracking data)：Bloomberg 4/28 周二报道·"The first liquefied natural gas shipment since the war began appears to have traversed the Strait of Hormuz to exit the Persian Gulf·The Mubaraz — which loaded a cargo in the United Arab Emirates around early March — is passing the southern tip of India, according to ship-tracking data on Tuesday"。Mubaraz 是 Iran 战起以来第一艘成功出关的 LNG 船·此前已在 UAE 港口滞留近 2 个月(3 月初装船至 4/28)·原计划的远东买家(可能是日 / 韩)长期等待。

Hormuz 通行 4/21-24 仅 5 艘 / 日(WaPo 4/27 引 Kpler)：Kpler 海事情报数据·"Between April 21 and April 24, five or fewer tankers or dry bulk vessels per day transited the Strait of Hormuz"——4/21-24 周通行量5 艘 / 日·相比战前 ~100 艘 / 日下降 95%。Mubaraz 的出关意味着 Iran 默许了已在港滞留船只的清理·但新进入 Hormuz 仍受限。Iran 通过 Pakistan 转的"先解封锁"提案核心要求："Iran reopens the Strait of Hormuz in exchange for Washington ending its blockade of ships moving to and from Iranian ports"——Mubaraz 出关可视为 Iran 单方面试探性放行·测试美方是否对等放行 Iran 油轮。

象征 > 实际：UAE LNG 容量有限：UAE LNG 出口产能较小(年 600-800 万吨·相比 Qatar 7,700 万吨)·Mubaraz 单船容量约 70-160k 立方米·折合 LNG 货值$80-120M·对全球 LNG 市场实际影响极小。但象征意义重大：(1) Iran 默认UAE LNG 不属于"封锁"对象·区分 Qatar / UAE / Saudi 处置；(2) 美方未拦截Mubaraz·暗示选择性放行的可能；(3) 市场试探性 risk-on 信号·虽然 Brent 4/27 仍 $108 收盘但日内一度因此消息回落 1-2%。

战略含义：Hormuz "selective opening" 路径试探：Mubaraz 案揭示 Iran 分级放行策略——盟友 / 中立国 LNG 优先放行·美方盟友 / 美国 LNG / 美方制裁对象延后。这与 Iran 4/27 通过 Pakistan 转的"先解封锁"分阶段提案一脉相承·Iran 寻求建立有条件 Hormuz 通行新机制。Day 61-65 关键观察点：(1) Mubaraz 后是否有第二艘 / 第三艘UAE LNG 跟进出关；(2) Qatar LNG 何时获 Iran 放行(Iran 4 月已对 Qatar Ras Laffan 设施空袭·关系紧张)；(3) 美方是否对等放行 Tifani / Phonix。Mubaraz 出关可能成为 Hormuz 重启的第一道试探性裂缝·若 5 月初有 5+ 艘 LNG 跟进则市场将快速 price in Hormuz selective open。
4/28 周二 New Delhi（Bloomberg · India MEA · Randhir Jaiswal） 外交 经济
印度 Chabahar 港 $120M 投资陷战争漩涡：(1) 印度外交部发言人 Randhir Jaiswal 4/28 声明：Chabahar 港正在与 US + Iran 双边讨论·"当前冲突显然是 complicating factor" · (2) 印度 2024 与 Iran 港务局签 10 年合约·投 $120M开发 Chabahar 作为绕开巴基斯坦通往 Afghanistan / Central Asia 的替代通道 · (3) 美方 2018 给印度Chabahar 制裁豁免·2025 年 9 月撤销·4 月给予临时延期·当前已到期 · (4) 印度考虑temporary divestment但不全面退出·将通过 rail link 扩展该港 · (5) 印度同时与 Iran 单独谈判tankers safe passagethrough Hormuz
印度 MEA 表态"complicating factor"(BBG 4/28 引 Randhir Jaiswal)：印度外交部发言人 Randhir Jaiswal 周一发表声明："This issue is under discussion with both Iran and US·Obviously, the current conflict is also a complicating factor"——印度第一次正式承认Chabahar 港项目受 Iran 战冲击。Chabahar 是印度在 Iran 东南部的战略港口·2024 年 5 月印度与 Iran Port and Maritime Organization 签10 年合约·投资 $120M开发集装箱码头 + 多用途泊位·目标是绕开巴基斯坦建立通往 Afghanistan / Central Asia 的陆上通道。

美方 2018 豁免历经 2025 撤销 + 4 月临时延期 + 当前到期(BBG)：Chabahar 美方制裁豁免历史轨迹：(1) 2018 年：Trump 第一任期对 Iran 全面制裁·但给印度 Chabahar 港豁免·允许印度继续在该港运营；(2) 2025 年 9 月：Trump 第二任期撤销豁免·印度面临立即停止Chabahar 业务的压力；(3) 2026 年初：印度通过 Modi-Trump 直接对话争取到4 月临时延期(具体日期未公开)·延期到 4 月底·当前已到期；(4) 当前：印度希望延期但 Iran 战急剧降低美方延期可能。Bloomberg 早前报道："Officials had been hopeful the sanctions waiver would be extended, but rising tensions between the US and Iran have made that unlikely"。

印度考虑 temporary divestment 而非全面退出(BBG)：印度政府正在评估多种选项·包括"a possible temporary divestment from the port"——临时暂停而非退出。原因：(1) 印度不愿放弃 Central Asia 通道战略价值·该项目历经 10+ 年规划与谈判；(2) 印度规划该港 rail link·扩展集装箱 + 散货功能；(3) 临时退出可规避美方制裁同时保留 10 年合约执行权。但战略上每个月空窗期都意味着 Iran 可能将该港重新分配给中国 / 俄罗斯·印度面临战略机会成本急剧上升。

Hormuz tankers safe passage 平行谈判(BBG 4/28)："India is heavily reliant on energy supplies through the strait and has been negotiating separately with Iran to allow its tankers to pass through safely"——印度同时进行双轨谈判：(1) 与美方谈 Chabahar 制裁豁免延期；(2) 与 Iran 谈印度油轮 / 货轮 Hormuz 通行安全。两轨之间平衡极其困难——若印度获 Hormuz 通行权·美方将认定为Iran 让步·进而要求印度对等让步(放弃 Chabahar / 加入 US 二次制裁阵营)。

战略含义：印度成 Iran 战结构性挤压样本：Iran 战让印度长期 mantra 的"strategic autonomy"(战略自主)面临空前压力。Modi 政府多线被迫：(1) Trump 对印度关税战(50% 全面关税中)；(2) Iran 战能源 / 化肥冲击(炼厂利润 -9 至 -68%)；(3) Chabahar 港战略沉没成本风险；(4) 国内 BJP 选情压力(2027 大选 Lok Sabha)。BBG："Trump's war with Iran since February has added a new layer of complexity in US-India relations"。Day 61-90 关键观察点：(1) 美方是否在 5 月给予 Chabahar 第二轮临时延期；(2) 印度是否在 G20 / BRICS 框架内公开支持 Iran 分阶段方案；(3) Reliance / Adani 印度大型能源企业是否考虑对 Iran 战中受损头寸申请政府救助。
4/27 周一 ET 收盘 / 4/28 Asia 早盘（Bloomberg · WSJ · White House · Lindsey Graham X） BREAKING 外交 市场
Trump Situation Room 会后白宫维持"红线"·Brent 收 $108·6 连阳：(1) 白宫发言人 Karoline Leavitt 4/27 ET 表态："Trump 对 Iran 红线made very, very clear"·Trump 将"very soon"亲自评 Iran 方案 · (2) WSJ：Trump 与顾问对 Iran 提案持怀疑·尤其是核问题搁置部分 · (3) Lindsey Graham 4/27 X 帖："要谈判得有两个 willing partners·若提案准确 Iran is playing games·总统请坚持原则" · (4) Brent 4/27 ET 收 $108+·6 连阳·WTI 收 $96+·"周末和谈希望破灭"再定价 · (5) Iran 通过 Pakistan 转的方案 = 重启 Hormuz / 美方解封锁 / 核谈判推迟到后期阶段
白宫维持"red lines"·总统将亲表态(BBG 4/27 ET 白宫记者会)：白宫新闻秘书 Karoline Leavitt 4/27 周一向记者表示·Trump 当天召开国安会评估 Iran 最新提案·"His red lines with respect to Iran have been made very, very clear"·并预告 Trump 将"very soon"亲自就此事表态。Bloomberg 同步报道：白宫官员正在讨论 Iran 的最新提案·但维持"任何协议下不允许 Iran 拥核"红线。WSJ 4/27 报道·Trump 与顾问对 Iran 提案持怀疑态度·尤其针对核计划相关条款·这与 Iran"核谈判推迟到后期阶段"的诉求正面冲突。

Lindsey Graham 公开加压(Senator Lindsey Graham X 4/27)：Trump 长期盟友、南卡共和党参议员 Lindsey Graham 4/27 在 X 公开帖："To have a successful negotiation you have to have two willing partners·Clearly, if this offer is accurate, Iran is playing games·Mr. President, stick to your guns for the good of the nation and the world"——共和党 hawks 公开向 Trump 施压不接受 Iran 分阶段方案·尤其反对核问题搁置。Graham 历史上在 Iran 议题立场一贯强硬·此次发声标志共和党核心圈对 Trump 接受 Iran 方案的政治成本提前定价。

Brent 4/27 ET 收 $108·6 连阳(BBG 4/27 ET close)：Brent 原油 4/27 ET 收盘站稳 $108/桶以上·美油结算价站稳 $96+·"Brent crude prices rose for a sixth straight session"。Bloomberg："Oil traders added to bullish moves after hopes for peace talks over the past weekend were dashed·Investors remain largely focused on a growing supply crunch created by the virtual standstill of flows through the strait"——市场重新定价 Witkoff/Kushner 4/26 取消巴基斯坦行+ Iran 不接受 4/24 议会决议外的让步·Hormuz 重启时间表至少推迟到 6 月底。

战略含义：方案进入"内部研判但不接受"卡位：Trump Situation Room 会议结果非"硬话拒绝"亦非"接受"·而是"审议中维持红线"——给市场delays without resolution定价。Bloomberg 引中东分析师："An interim accord would echo what many Middle East analysts have said for weeks·that the US and Iran should reopen the strait as soon as possible·while leaving issues such as nuclear program for later talks"·部分波斯湾阿拉伯国家与欧洲领导人预计这种谈判至少需 6 个月。但 Trump 立场维持："Iran's atomic program must be resolved as part of any agreement·blockade will stay in place until then"——美方把封锁作为对核议题的核心筹码·拒绝 Iran"先解封锁"诉求。Day 61 关键观察点：(1) Trump 是否在 Truth Social 公开正式回复 Iran 方案；(2) War Powers Resolution 5/1 deadline 前 Trump 是否申请 30 天 safe withdrawal 延期；(3) OPEC+ 是否在月底前 emergency 表态备用产能调度。
4/26 周六 Truth Social / 4/28 Asia 早盘（Washington Post · Truth Social · Tasnim · Pakistan officials） BREAKING 外交
Trump 取消 Witkoff/Kushner 巴基斯坦行·谈判破局：(1) 4/26 周六 Trump 突然取消 Witkoff + Kushner 出访 Islamabad·"Too much time wasted on traveling, too much work" · (2) Trump："Iran tremendous infighting and confusion within their leadership·Nobody knows who is in charge·we have all the cards·they have none" · (3) Trump 对记者：取消 10 分钟内 Iran 即送来"much better"提案·"offered a lot, but not enough" · (4) Iran 外交部 4/25 已先发声明"无意与美方会面·只对 Pakistan 双边访问" · (5) 美方原计划 Witkoff/Kushner 飞 Islamabad·VP Vance 不参加(信号已降级)
Trump 4/26 取消巴基斯坦行(WaPo 4/26 + Truth Social)：4/26 周六 Trump 在 Truth Social 突然宣布取消美方代表团出访 Islamabad·"Too much time wasted on traveling, too much work·Besides which, there is tremendous infighting and confusion within their 'leadership'·Nobody knows who is in charge, including them·Also, we have all the cards, they have none·If they want to talk, all they have to do is call!!!"——这与白宫新闻秘书 Leavitt 4/25 周五"美代表团将赴 Islamabad·正面进展可期"的官方表态仅相差 24 小时·Witkoff + Kushner 临行被叫停。

Iran 同步降级谈判预期(WaPo + Tasnim 4/26)：Iran 外交部发言人 Esmaeil Baqaei 4/26 在 X 帖："No meeting is planned to take place between Iran and the U.S.·Iran's observations would be conveyed to Pakistan"——Iran 外长 Araghchi 团队 4/25 抵 Islamabad 但仅作双边访问·拒绝与美方代表见面。Iran 团队 4/25 晚已离巴飞 Oman·二度行程指向 Russia——Iran 外交线绕过 US 直接构建 Pakistan/Oman/Russia 三方背书。

Trump"10 分钟内收到 better paper"(WaPo 引 Trump 4/26 记者问)：Trump 4/26 周六对记者："We're not going to be traveling 15, 16 hours to have a meeting with people that nobody ever heard of·Immediately, when I canceled it, within 10 minutes, we got a new paper that was much better·[Iran] offered a lot, but not enough"——这就是 4/27 BBG/Axios 报道的"分阶段方案"前身·Trump 公开承认取消行程 = 升级筹码·迫使 Iran 让步出新提案。但"much better"与"not enough"的双重表态意味着 Trump 把新提案视为起点而非终点·要求 Iran 在核问题上进一步让步。

战略含义：谈判结构进入"以拖待变"：Pakistan 中介 4/27 已"解除安保限制·学校复课"——本身放弃近期突破预期。WaPo 引前巴基斯坦驻美大使 Masood Khan："Unless we remove the two blockades·the twin blockades, there cannot be any breakthrough for the start of a second round of negotiations"——双向封锁(美方对 Iran 港 + Iran 对 Hormuz)成核心结构性卡点·任一方先松手都将被对方解读为战略让步。Trump 4/27 ET 接受 reporters 问"是否继续 ceasefire"·答"haven't even thought about it"——透露他将停火视为 expendable bargaining chip·5/1 War Powers deadline 前若 Iran 不全盘接受美方"45 天 phased ceasefire"框架·宣布"ceasefire void"概率上升至 30-40%。
4/27 周一晚 Indian Ocean / 4/28 Asia 早盘（Bloomberg · ship-tracking signals · Pentagon · Indo-Pacific Command） BREAKING 军事
Tifani/Phonix 4/27 晚反转东行·路径不明：(1) 4/27 ship-tracking 信号显示·两艘 Iran-linked 油轮 Tifani + Phonix(Majestic X) 停止西航·改向东向·与 Day 60 西航 Cape Town/Diego Garcia 判断反向 · (2) 信号显示船舶仍报原 Asia 目的港·美方未公开船只 / 货物去向 · (3) 美军 4/14 起对 Iran shipping 封锁·配合 Iran 4 月初对 Hormuz 反封锁(US-Iran 双向封锁)持续 · (4) BBG："The vessels that initially appeared to be moving west·reversed course and took an eastern heading late Monday" · (5) Centcom 把媒体询问转给 Indo-Pacific Command·后者未回应——美军内部对 Tifani/Phonix 处置仍未定
Tifani/Phonix 4/27 晚反转东行(BBG 4/27 12:29 UTC)：Bloomberg 4/27 报道·两艘被美军 4/21-23 在 Sri Lanka 附近拦截的 Iran-linked VLCC 油轮(Tifani + Phonix·后者也称 Majestic X)·根据数字 AIS 信号·"The vessels that initially appeared to be moving west in close proximity to one another·reversed course and took an eastern heading late Monday"。这与 Day 60(4/27 早间)BBG 报道方向相反——之前判断双船西航·可能驶向 Cape Town(转运至 US)或 Diego Garcia(英控 Chagos 群岛美军基地)。

美方未公开处置·船舶 AIS 信号"造假"(BBG 4/27)：Bloomberg："The US has given no formal indication of its plans for the vessels or their cargoes·The tankers were still signaling the same Asian destinations they were when the interdictions happened·adding to the confusion"——船载 AIS 信号故意保留原 Asia 目的港(可能是 Iran 操作以混淆·或美军托管下保留原信号以维持 plausible deniability)·实际航向不可信。Bloomberg 评：船舶 AIS"原 Asia 目的"+ 实际"东行调头"+ 美军沉默处置·三层信号叠加意味着美军仍在评估处置方案·可能在没收-释放-护航回 Iran三选一中犹豫。

Centcom 把询问转 Indo-Pacific Command(BBG 4/27)：US Central Command(负责中东)4/27 把媒体询问转给 Indo-Pacific Command(负责印太)·后者未即时回应。指挥权移交本身意味着 Tifani/Phonix 已离开 Centcom 战区(印度洋东部进入 Indo-Pacom 区域)·美军内部对处置权限未达共识。这是 4/14 起 Centcom 38 船次封锁中第一次出现指挥权跨战区争议。

战略含义：Venezuela 模式实施仍未确认：Day 60 BBG 推测的"美国版 Venezuela 模式"(扣船转运至美军港口)需要明确的政治授权(总统行政命令或国务院制裁声明)·目前美方沉默处置意味着 Trump 政府未做出最终决定。可能性：(1) 放回 Iran(护航返航)·若 4/27 Situation Room 决定走"路径 B"·释放 Tifani/Phonix 作为善意信号；(2) 继续扣留待审议·东向调头可能是停泊在国际水域等指令；(3) 转运至 Diego Garcia·东向是绕路·之后再南转。市场关键 catalyst：若 4/28-29 美方公开宣布没收原油 + 拍卖·Iran 必将提交国际仲裁·并以"对等扣 GCC 船只"反制·Persian Gulf 油运保险费可能再升 50%(当前已从战前千美元涨至近百万美元)。
4/27 周一 St. Petersburg（Washington Post · RIA Novosti · Russian state media） 外交
Putin 给 Araghchi"竭尽全力"承诺：(1) Iran 外长 Araghchi 4/27 抵 St. Petersburg·与 Putin 会面 · (2) Putin："we will do everything that serves your interests·让和平尽快到来" · (3) Russia 角色从"oil 中介"升至"安全担保人"·Iran 通过 Pakistan 转的方案核心一项即"Russia 提供 against further US attacks 担保" · (4) Russia 想借 Iran 议题为 Ukraine 谈判加分·此前曾向美方保证"未向 Iran 提供 targeting information" · (5) Iran 外长称对俄合作"of particular importance"·将与 Putin 协调"对美方共同立场"
Putin 公开"竭尽全力"承诺(WaPo 4/27 引 RIA Novosti)：俄总统 Vladimir Putin 4/27 周一在 St. Petersburg 接见 Iran 外长 Abbas Araghchi·公开表态："We very much hope that, relying on this courage and the aspiration for independence, the Iranian people, under the leadership of the new leader, will get through this difficult period of trials — and that peace will come·For our part, we will do everything that serves your interests and the interests of all the peoples of the region in order to ensure that this peace is achieved as soon as possible"。这是 Iran 战开战 60 天来 Putin 首次公开做出"竭尽全力"承诺·过去 Russia 仅在中介渠道 + 油运合作上配合 Iran·此次升至公开担保人姿态。

Russia 升至"安全担保人"地位(WaPo 4/27 + 4/26 Pakistan 官员)：根据 Pakistan 官员 4/26 向 WaPo 透露·Iran 通过 Pakistan 转达的方案核心包括"Russia 提供 against further US attacks 担保" + "正式 Iran-Oman 联合管控 Hormuz"。Russia 角色经历三阶段升级：(1) 战起前(2/28 之前)·Russia 是 Iran 主要 oil 买家 + 武器供应方；(2) 战中(3-4 月)·Russia 提供有限targeting information(美方指控)·担当中介渠道；(3) 4/27 之后·Russia 公开升至安全担保人·Putin 承诺"do everything"——这是 Iran 第一次取得明确的大国担保。

Russia 双重战略：Iran + Ukraine 议价(WaPo 4/27)：Russia 同步进行的另一谈判是 Ukraine·Putin 一直试图避免与 Trump 关系恶化·并向美方保证"未向 Iran 提供 targeting information"。"Russia has long been seeking to offer its services as an intermediary in negotiations between Iran, the U.S. and Israel·in hopes of leveraging its relationship with Iran to bolster its standing with the Trump administration and potentially secure concessions on Ukraine"——Putin 把 Iran 议题作为对美方议价筹码·若 Russia 帮助美方说服 Iran 接受"45 天 phased ceasefire"·则在 Ukraine 谈判中要求承认 4 个东南州 + 撤销部分制裁。

战略含义：四方架构对抗 G7 主导秩序：Iran 4 国担保架构(Pakistan + Oman + Qatar + Russia)+ Iran 实际对抗 US/UK/Israel 三方架构。Russia 升至担保人意味着 Iran 突破"孤立国家"框架·获得大国背书·谈判桌位置实质提升。但 Russia 的"双重押注"也暗示——若 Trump 接受 Russia 在 Iran 上的中介角色·Putin 将顺势在 Ukraine 议题上要求对等让步·两线议题互相挂钩。Day 61 关键观察点：Trump 是否在 Truth Social 公开评论 Putin 4/27 表态——若忽略·暗示美方拒绝接受 Russia 担保人地位·谈判可能因结构性僵局走向破裂。
4/27 周一 Mumbai（Bloomberg · Reliance Industries · Macquarie · Kotak） 能源 市场
印度炼厂保汇崩盘·政府考虑"4 年首加油价"：(1) Reliance Industries Q4 利润 -9%·6 季度新低·油气化学业务拖累 · (2) Mangalore Refinery & Petrochemicals Q4 利润 -68%·小型国营炼厂受损更深 · (3) 印度炼厂盈亏平衡线 $80-85/桶·当前 Brent $108·政府冻结油价致状态炼厂"无前例 strain" · (4) freight 上涨 10-15 倍·crude 溢价 $20-30/桶(战前几美元)·war-risk insurance 千美元到近百万美元 · (5) Kotak："汽油 / 柴油有理由涨 25-28 卢比/升·政治考量将限制涨幅"
Reliance Q4 -9%·Mangalore -68%(BBG 4/27 + Reliance Industries earnings)：印度第三大原油进口国·炼厂利润遭受罕见冲击。Reliance Industries Ltd. 报告 March 季度利润下跌 ~9% 至 6 季度新低·主要受 oil-to-chemicals 业务拖累。小型国营 Mangalore Refinery & Petrochemicals Ltd. 季度利润同比 -68%·跌幅更深。Reliance COO Srinivas Tuttagunta 周五对分析师："We have never seen such a situation earlier"——freight rates jumped 10-15 倍·crude premiums 从战前几美元飙至 $20-30/桶·war-risk insurance 从千美元飙至近百万美元·三层成本叠加。

盈亏平衡线 $80-85·当前 Brent $108(BBG 引 Macquarie)：印度 integrated processors 需要 crude 价格在 $80-85/桶才能盈亏平衡(Macquarie 分析师估算)·当前 Brent 4/27 ET 收 $108+·已远超盈亏平衡线 $25-30/桶·炼厂每天净亏。印度油气部数据：oil refining and retailing companies 当前每升柴油亏 100 卢比($1.1)·汽油亏 20 卢比。Kotak Institutional Equities note："gasoline and diesel prices could credibly be increased by 25-28 卢比/升·Political considerations, though, will likely keep expected hikes modest"——政府或4 年来首次涨油价(2022 年初以来未涨)·涨幅可能仅 5-10 卢比/升·远低于市场需要。

政府冻结油价 + LPG 强制生产(BBG 4/27)：印度政府"with an eye on price-sensitive voters"·冻结油价整个战争期间·限制炼厂 pass on 成本能力。同时imposing crippling taxes to curb exports·要求炼厂维持高 run rates 并优先生产 low-margin LPG(液化石油气)·缓解 cooking fuel 短缺(Iran 战重创 Qatar LNG 复合设施·全球 LPG 供给-15%)。Reliance 警告·"Energy markets will stay volatile thanks to risk premiums·even when the conflict ends·war-related costs will take time to cool"。

战略含义：印度选举周期与 Iran 战正面冲撞：印度 4 月数据：oil imports 同比 -10%·diesel sales +9%(前 15 天)·gasoline sales +12.5%——需求井喷 + 供给受困·政府不得不动用 strategic reserves。Modi 政府面临2027 年 Lok Sabha 选举压力·若涨油价选民反弹严重·若不涨炼厂资产负债表崩溃·两者都将让 BJP 政治成本升级。Reliance Industries 4/27 股价 -3%·印度 BSE Energy Index 月内 -8%·若 Brent 5 月维持 $105+·Reliance 全年利润可能同比 -25-30%·拖累 Sensex 全年涨幅。
4/27 周一 Ho Chi Minh City（Bloomberg · PetroVietnam Gas · Haiphong People's Committee） 能源
PetroVietnam Gas 5 月美 LPG超中东 LPG·全球 LPG 流向重塑：(1) PV GAS 5 月计划进口 66,000 吨美 LPG vs 44,000 吨中东 LPG·美国超中东 · (2) 4 月 PV GAS 已进口 76,000 吨美 LPG·相比 3 月仅 2,200 吨(首次买美) · (3) PV GAS CEO Phong："大多数 term contracts 因战中断·suppliers 宣布 force majeure" · (4) PV GAS 战起 3 月内共进 250,000 吨 LPG·其中超半数来自美国 · (5) 越南 Haiphong 港获批新建大型 LPG terminal(7.5 万亿越南盾·$2.9 亿)·2028 Q3 投产
PV GAS 5 月美 LPG 超中东(BBG 4/27 + PetroVietnam Gas 采访)：越南国营 PetroVietnam Gas JSC 计划 5 月进口66,000 吨美 LPG·相比 44,000 吨来自中东·"in the latest sign that the Iran war is reordering global energy flows"。4 月 PV GAS 已进口76,000 吨美 LPG·"a massive jump from 2,200 吨 in March·which was the first time the firm bought from the US"——一个月内美 LPG 进口量增 35 倍。Iran 战重创Qatar Ras Laffan LNG 复合设施·全球 LPG 主要供应国 Qatar 产能大幅缩减·PV GAS 与全球 LPG 买家被迫重新构建供应链。

"force majeure"潮 + 供应链重塑(BBG 引 Phong)：PV GAS President + CEO Pham Van Phong 4/24 在 Ho Chi Minh City 接受采访·"Most of our term contracts were disrupted as suppliers declared force majeure due to the war·That prompted the company to secure alternative supplies from new partners in Australia, the US, Europe, and Africa"。Iran 战起 3 个月·PV GAS 共进口 250,000 吨 LPG·"just over half will be from the US"——美国 LPG 占比从战前 ~0% 升至 ~50%·结构性洗牌。

Asia 各国被迫重塑能源供应链(BBG)："The purchases point to a widespread reconfiguration of the global LPG trade triggered by the war·with a number of Asian countries struggling to manage unprecedented shortages after Iranian strikes knocked out production in top supplier Qatar"。印度被迫boost refinery output of LPG(降低 cooking fuel 缺口)·而 PV GAS 等亚洲消费者"being forced to turn to new suppliers as expectations set in that a return to pre-war conditions is unlikely"。Phong："this is an opportunity for us to rethink our approach·diversify our supplier base and reshape our supply chain"——亚洲市场对中东能源依赖的结构性转向已经开始。

战略含义：美国 LNG / LPG 出口产业获 multi-year tailwind：Iran 战外溢的最大长期受益方是美国 LNG / LPG 出口产业——亚洲买家(印度 / 越南 / 韩国 / 日本)结构性转向美国·不仅是短期 spot 采购·而是多年期 term contracts。PV GAS 4/27 同时获批 Haiphong 大型 LPG terminal(7.5 万亿越南盾·$2.9 亿·2028 Q3 投产)·容量 + 储存能力大幅扩张·并考虑同步建 LNG terminal——这意味着越南未来 5 年从中东 LPG 转向美国 LPG 的基础设施已就位。Cheniere Energy / Sempra / Venture Global 等美国 LNG/LPG 出口商新签 take-or-pay 长约有望涌现·美国能源出口收入结构性 +20-30%(2026-2030 年)·美 BWP-DCP 等 midstream 公司股价已反映此 tailwind。
4/27 周一 Bekaa Valley（Washington Post · IDF · Lebanon Health Ministry · Hezbollah Telegram） 军事
Lebanon 死亡破 2,500·Israel 4/27 重启 Bekaa 空袭：(1) Lebanon Health Ministry 4/26 周六公布·Israel 自 3/2 起空袭累计死亡 2,500+(此前 Day 60 数字 2,454) · (2) Israel 4/27 周一renewed airstrikes 在 Lebanon Bekaa Valley·因地面部队遭 Hezbollah 伤亡 · (3) Israel IDF 4/26 通知 7 个南黎村庄居民撤离·后空袭 Tyre 等 · (4) Hezbollah Telegram 帖："we will keep responding to the strikes" · (5) Trump 4/23 宣布 Lebanon-Israel 停火延 3 周至 5/17·但 4/26-27 重启对峙形成新一轮 escalation 风险
Lebanon 死亡破 2,500(WaPo 4/27 + Lebanon Health Ministry)：Lebanon 卫生部 4/26 周末更新·自 3/2 Israel 重启对 Lebanon 大规模空袭以来·"The death toll in Lebanon surpassed 2,500 over the weekend"——较 Day 60 报告的 2,454 数字 + 50。该数字包括 Hezbollah 战士 + 平民伤亡·近一周伤亡集中在 Bekaa Valley + 南黎。Lebanon 自 3/2 Israel 重启大规模空袭以来已成 Iran 战除 Iran 本土外死亡数最高的国家。

Israel 4/27 重启 Bekaa Valley 空袭(WaPo 4/27)：WaPo："Israel renewed airstrikes on Monday in Lebanon's Bekaa Valley after seeing casualties among its ground forces·which are occupying a swath of southern Lebanon"——Israel 地面部队在 occupying 南黎期间遭遇 Hezbollah 反击·伤亡触发 IDF 启动 Bekaa Valley 空袭报复·这是4/8 first phase ceasefire 暂时压制后·Lebanon-Israel 战线新一轮 escalation。Day 60 IDF 已通知7 个南黎巴嫩村庄居民撤离·随后空袭多区·Lebanon NNA 报道至 4/27 已 50+ 平民伤亡。

Hezbollah Telegram 公开报复(Hezbollah Telegram + Reuters)：Hezbollah Telegram 帖："We will keep responding to the strikes"——明确公开继续对 Israel 反击。Hezbollah 4/27 已向 Israel 北部发射10+ 枚火箭弹·主要瞄准 Galilee 地区·虽未造成大规模 Israel 伤亡·但双向交火继续意味着 4/8 ceasefire 事实失效。Trump 4/23 宣布 Lebanon-Israel 停火延 3 周至 5/17·但 4/26-27 重启对峙意味着该 deadline 提前破裂。

战略含义：Lebanon 战线复活让 Hormuz 谈判更复杂：WaPo 4/27 评："Continued fighting between Israel and Hezbollah could strain the U.S.-Iran talks·Lebanon remains a major sticking point·along with Hormuz and the fate of Iran's nuclear program"——Iran/Hezbollah/Israel 三角关系紧密·Lebanon 战线复活直接压低 Iran 接受美方"分阶段 ceasefire"框架的意愿(Iran 不能在 Hormuz 让步同时让 Hezbollah 持续被打)。回顾：4/7 美伊达成初步停火协议数小时后·Netanyahu 即对 Beirut/Bekaa/南黎发动 100+ 次空袭·"infuriating Iran just days before VP Vance was set to meet with Iranian officials"——Lebanon 战线历史性破坏 US-Iran 谈判。Day 61-65 关键观察点：(1) Israel 是否继续 Bekaa Valley 空袭至 5/17 deadline；(2) Hezbollah 是否升级至火箭群发；(3) Lebanon 5/17 deadline 是否被 Trump 单方延期或宣告"void"——任一升级都将结构性破坏 Hormuz 谈判。
4/27 周日 Krabi（Washington Post · Thai MFA · Russian Foreign Ministry · Kpler） 外交 能源
泰国 FM 公开抨击：美国"零援助"·亚洲条约盟友失望：(1) Thai FM Sihasak Phuangketkeow 4/27 在 Krabi 接受 WaPo 专访·"美方未直接 help·只让我们买美国 oil/gas" · (2) 泰国转向俄罗斯购化肥(乌素价格翻倍)·泰农业部长访 Moscow · (3) 泰柴油价 4 月历史新高·urea 化肥短缺打击 1,000 万农民 · (4) 3 月 Mayuree Naree 泰籍散货船过 Hormuz 时遭 Iran 导弹击中·3 名泰籍船员死亡·Iran 称未获通行许可 · (5) Sihasak："美方目标 shifting all the time·从 regime change 到 Iran nuclear·unpredictable"
Thai FM 公开抨击美国"零援助"(WaPo 4/27 引 Sihasak 专访)：Thailand 外交部长 Sihasak Phuangketkeow 4/26 周六在南部 Krabi 省接受 WaPo 专访·"The Trump administration has not offered any direct help to Thailand·a long-standing U.S. treaty ally·as it struggles with the wide-ranging economic damage from the American-Israeli war against Iran"。Sihasak："I think they're aware that there are consequences from the war·but they haven't come out to talk to us about how they can help·They haven't approached us directly saying·'Oh, we understand that you have to endure the impact, and we can help you out'"——Trump 唯一回应是公开表态"buy oil from the United States of America·We have plenty"。

泰国转向俄罗斯购燃料 / 化肥(WaPo)：Sihasak 透露·泰国已派农业部长访 Moscow谈采购·"desperate to secure fertilizer before the start of the country's planting season in May"——泰国试图采购 Russian crude·但泰国银行担心违反美国制裁而暂缓。乌素 (urea) 化肥价格"nearly doubled since the start of the war"·打击泰国 1,000 万农民·这个月柴油价格历史新高。Sihasak 在与中国外长王毅 4/26 在 Krabi 会晤时也讨论了 Hormuz 受困的8 艘泰籍船只放行。

Mayuree Naree 3 月被 Iran 导弹击沉案(WaPo)：3 月泰籍散货船 Mayuree Naree 试图穿越 Hormuz 时被 Iran 导弹击中·"killing 3 Thai crew members·An additional 20 crew members were rescued"。船舶运营方 Precious Shipping 声明已获通行许可·Iran 当局称未获许可。Sihasak："We don't know what happened·an investigation is underway"——Iran 战第一次造成第三国船员死亡·至今责任未明。该案让 Thai 公众对继续穿越 Hormuz 的风险厌恶大幅升级·泰国船公司 4 月起大规模避开 Hormuz·改走南非好望角(航程 +30%·成本 +50%)。

战略含义：美亚条约盟友信任流失：Sihasak："It seems that the Trump administration's objectives are shifting all the time·At one point, the goal appeared to be regime change·Now, it seems to be about ending Iran's nuclear program·There's a lot of unpredictability in the U.S. government policy·This is not limited to the war·Trump's sweeping tariff campaign has surprised many allies·His rapid dismantling of U.S. aid programs has left poor communities across the world exposed"——这是泰国 self-distancing from US·在 Iran 战 60 天后正式公开化。Sihasak 同时给出对替代方案的暗示："This is not about us taking sides in the geopolitical competition·It's about what the U.S. is doing, which is forcing us to rethink some relationships"。Day 61 关键含义：(1) Trump 4/27 Situation Room 决策需考虑亚洲条约盟友已开始结构性转向·(2) 美方在亚太的软实力流失正在 quantifiable 累积·(3) 泰国 / 越南 / 印度 / 菲律宾等亚洲中等强国可能在 5 月集体表态支持 Iran 分阶段方案·迫使 Trump 在 G7 框架外考虑多边方案。
4月27日 周一DAY 60
4/27 周一下午 ET Washington（Axios · Bloomberg · CNN · Iran International · Jerusalem Post · Euronews） BREAKING 外交
Trump 4/27 周一 Situation Room 召开国安会·评估 Iran "Hormuz-first" 分阶段方案：(1) Trump 周一下午 ET 在 White House Situation Room 召集 国家安全和外交政策核心圈·研判 Iran 通过 Pakistan 渠道转达的新提案 · (2) 与会者：VP JD Vance + 国务卿 Marco Rubio + 国防部长 Pete Hegseth + 财长 Scott Bessent + CIA 局长 John Ratcliffe + 参联会主席 Gen. Dan Caine + 国家安全顾问 · (3) Iran 方案三步走："先开 Hormuz · 再结束战争 · 美国解除海军封锁 · 然后才谈核浓缩" — Iran 把"解封锁"作为前置条件 · (4) 美方 45 天 phased ceasefire 框架要求 Hormuz 重启与核约束同步谈·首阶段从 Iran 移出 HEU 高浓缩铀 · (5) Iran Foreign Minister Araghchi 同日抵 Moscow 见 Putin·WH 发言人 Olivia Wales："不会通过媒体谈判·美方 holds the cards·绝不允许 Iran 拥核"
会议召集与与会名单(Axios + Iran International + Bloomberg 4/27)：Axios 独家·"Trump plans to hold a meeting in the White House Situation Room on Monday with national security and foreign policy officials"——4/27 周一下午 ET Trump 在 White House Situation Room 主持国家安全和外交政策核心圈会议·研判 Iran 通过 Pakistan 渠道转达的"分阶段方案"。Iran International 综合多源披露与会者：VP JD Vance + 国务卿 Marco Rubio + 国防部长 Pete Hegseth + 财长 Scott Bessent + CIA 局长 John Ratcliffe + 参联会主席 Gen. Dan Caine + 国家安全顾问。会议召集时点·4/8 Pakistan 斡旋的 stage-1 ceasefire 原 14 天窗口已于 4/22 到期·Trump 4/21 宣布无限期延长(但 Persian Gulf 海军封锁维持)·停火仍属"indefinite but fragile"状态·美方一名 senior official 警告"without progress, hostilities could resume imminently"——这是 Trump 政府第一次以 Situation Room 形式正式审议 Iran 分阶段方案·标志方案从"硬话拒绝"升至"内部研判"。

Iran "Hormuz-first" 三步走方案(Jerusalem Post + Axios + Yahoo News 4/27)：Iran 通过 Pakistan 转达的方案核心顺序：(1) 第一步·重开 Strait of Hormuz·恢复航运；(2) 第二步·结束战争·全面停火；(3) 第三步·美国解除对 Iran 资产的海军封锁；(4) 第四步·待封锁解除之后·再谈核浓缩。Iran 把"解封锁"明确设为前置条件——而封锁正是美方在核议题上的核心筹码。Iran 议会 4/24 决议设的核红线维持：拒绝 100% compliance·要求保留民用浓缩权·Tasnim 4/27 重申"Iran 立场不让步·任何对 Hormuz 通行 / 封锁的延续都构成停火协议违反"。Trump 公开回应（JPost 引）·"when you have vast amounts of oil pouring through your system... if for any reason this line is closed... that line explodes from within"——明示封锁不撤·直至全面 deal 落地。

美方 45 天 phased ceasefire 框架(Axios + The National + houseofsaud.com 4/27 综合)：美方框架与 Iran 方案顺序倒置：(1) 45 天分阶段停火·Hormuz 重启与核约束同步谈判·非串行；(2) 首阶段即要求 Iran HEU 高浓缩铀全部移出境(运至第三国 IAEA 监管)；(3) 谈判与封锁解除同步推进·非"先解封锁"。两套框架的核心分歧：Iran 要"解耦 Hormuz / 核"·美方要"捆绑同步"——这意味着 Situation Room 会议讨论的不是是否接受 Iran 方案·而是如何对方案做条件性 counter-offer。Pakistan 中介角色被分析师质疑：houseofsaud.com 引"Pakistani intermediaries spent more time helping the Iranians negotiate among themselves than bridging actual US-Iran gaps"——Iran 内部 IRGC 强硬派 vs Pezeshkian 政府温和派本身未达共识·Pakistan 实际承担Tehran 内部协调员角色而非美伊桥接员。

Araghchi 同日 Moscow + WH 表态(BBG 4/27 + Moscow Times)：Iran Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi 4/27 同日抵 Moscow·与 Putin 在 St. Petersburg 会晤——leveraging Iran-Russia 2025 年 1 月 20 年战略伙伴条约·Araghchi 对 Moscow Times 称磋商"of particular importance"。这是Iran 方案落地 + Russia 背书的同日双线推进·向 Trump 政府施压"Iran 不孤立"。WH 发言人 Olivia Wales 4/27 凌晨给 Bloomberg 的官方声明："These are sensitive diplomatic discussions and the US will not negotiate through the press·As the President has said, the United States holds the cards and will only make a deal that puts the American people first, never allowing Iran to have a nuclear weapon"——三层硬话：(1) 拒绝公开博弈·(2) 美方仍是优势方·(3) 核红线绝对。但 Trump 本人在 Truth Social 措辞持续矛盾·从"the concept of the deal is done"到"Iran can't blackmail us"反复横跳·释放谈判筹码与开战筹码并行信号。

战略含义：Day 60 决定性窗口：Situation Room 会议 4/27 ET 周一下午召开·Day 60 是多重硬 deadline 汇聚：(1) War Powers Resolution 60 天 deadline = 5/1 周五(Trump 3/2 致函国会通报 2/28 对 Iran 军事行动·1973 War Powers Act 规定 60 天内国会须通过 AUMF·否则总统须撤军；参众两院至 4/23 已 5 次否决 War Powers Resolution·5/1 后 Trump 三选一：撤军 / 申请国会 AUMF 授权 / 申请单次 30 天延期·延期仅限 "safe withdrawal" 用途·非继续作战)·(2) Trump 4/21 宣布的无限期 ceasefire实为"无 sunset clause 但无明文条款约束"·任何一方可单边宣布违约·美方 senior official 4/27 警告"hostilities could resume imminently"·(3) 美海军 Persian Gulf 三航母集结完成(Bush + Eisenhower 4/26 抵 + Vinson 5/1 抵·恰在 War Powers deadline 当日)——1991 年海湾战争以来最大美海军中东集结·(4) Centcom 封锁累计 38 船次·Tifani / Phonix 双 VLCC 4/21-23 被美军登舷后改向西航·"Venezuela 模式"启动。Situation Room 决策的两条路径：路径 A·正式拒绝 Iran 分阶段方案·5/1 前申请 30 天 "safe withdrawal" 延期·封锁加码 + 三航母施压·短期内宣布"ceasefire void"；路径 B·5/1 前与 Iran 落地"Hormuz 解封锁 + HEU 移出同步走" framework·把 Iran "先后"诉求改为"打包"·避开 War Powers 法律危机。市场关键 catalyst：周一 ET 16:00 后 Trump 是否在 Truth Social 公开评 Iran 方案——硬话拒绝则油价测试 $110-112 关键阻力·"willing to consider"则压回 $103-105。欧盟 4/27 Merz 言论已明确支持"分阶段"·美方若拒绝将面临欧美裂痕扩大。Day 60 是 Iran 战从 60 天 escalation 转向 90 天 deal-or-war 二选一的结构性拐点。
4/27 周一 13:25 UTC Marsberg / 4/27 ET（Bloomberg · German Chancellery） BREAKING 外交
德国总理 Merz 公开称美方"被 Iran 羞辱"·欧美裂痕扩大：(1) Friedrich Merz 4/27 周一在德国 Marsberg 中学公开演讲·"an entire nation is being humiliated by the Iranian leadership·particularly by these so-called Revolutionary Guards" · (2) Merz："看不出美方现在选择哪个 strategic exit"·Iran 方"very skilfully not negotiating" · (3) Merz："若早知会持续 5-6 周·我会更 forcefully 警告 Trump"——曾就 2/28 战起前未与德 / 欧领导人协商表达不满 · (4) Merz："这场 Iran 战争对德国经济表现有直接影响·必须尽快结束" · (5) Meloni / Sanchez / Merz 三大欧盟领导人公开重新评估对 Trump 关系
Merz 4/27 公开称美方"被 Iran 羞辱"(BBG 4/27 13:25 UTC)：德国总理 Friedrich Merz 4/27 周一在 Westphalia 选区 Marsberg 中学对一组学生发表异常坦率讲话·"The US is being 'humiliated' by Iranian leaders as President Donald Trump struggles to negotiate an end to the war"。Merz："I don't see what strategic exit the Americans are now choosing·Tehran's negotiators are proceeding very skilfully — or indeed very skilfully not negotiating"——把 Iran 谈判 negotiator 的"以拖待变"策略升至公开赞许·暗讽 Trump 政府没有可见 endgame。Merz 进一步："The result is that an entire nation is being humiliated by the Iranian leadership·particularly by these so-called Revolutionary Guards"——把 Iran IRGC 从战时反派定位为"战略性强者"·这是西方 G7 主要领导人第一次公开做出此种评价。

欧盟领导人对 Trump 重评估三连(BBG 4/27)：Merz 言论代表 European leaders 对 Trump 关系的"reassessment"·BBG："A tendency to smooth ties by currying favor has given way to a more sober perspective of a US president who has repeatedly called into question NATO·bolstered European far-right forces·threatened to seize Greenland"。具体三连：(1) Italian PM Meloni(此前与 Trump 关系密切)·因 4 月初 Pope Leo XIV 风波遭 Trump 公开 verbal attack·4/25 Cyprus EU summit 表态"relations with US are still solid·but no recent contact with Trump"——双向降温；(2) Spanish PM Sanchez·因 Spain 在 Iran 战中拒绝美军基地通行而被 Trump 报复加征关税·一直公开批评 Trump；(3) Merz 本人·March White House 访问后曾与 Trump 维持"comparative bonhomie"·但德国能源价飙升(德国是欧洲最大经济体·原油 / 天然气进口高度依赖中东)迫使 Merz 转向公开批评。

Merz 关键政策表态(BBG 引)：Merz："If I had known that this would go on for five or six weeks and keep getting worse·I would have made my point to him even more forcefully"·"The lesson from previous wars, including US-led campaigns in Afghanistan or Iraq·is that the problem lies in bringing such conflicts to an end"·"I don't see an immediate prospect for an end·with Iran stronger than its adversaries had expected and Americans lacking a convincing negotiating strategy"·"This war against Iran has a direct impact on our economic performance and must therefore be brought to an end as soon as possible"。Merz 明确点名"德 / 欧领导人在 2/28 战前未被 Trump 政府 consulted"·这是欧美战时核心矛盾。

战略含义：欧洲正式离开 Trump"压 Iran 求和"叙事：Merz 4/27 言论结构性意义：(1) 欧美 G7 内部第一次出现"美方 strategic exit 缺失"公开诊断·此前 Macron / Starmer 仅口头表达担忧未到"羞辱"层级；(2) 欧盟主要经济体首脑开始预设"Iran 强于美方预期"新框架·这意味着欧盟可能转向支持 Iran 4 大要价中的"分阶段方案"；(3) Trump 4/27 ET Situation Room 决策时面临欧美裂痕新约束——若拒绝 Iran 分阶段方案·欧盟 4-5 月可能独立谈判(欧盟外长 4 月已 4 次 Tehran 通话)·Trump 在 Persian Gulf 单极主导地位结构性受挑战。BBG："The chancellor, whose government is grappling with a spike in fuel prices that is hitting Europe's No. 1 economy, has grown more critical of the Iran campaign"。
4/27 周一 12:29 UTC Indian Ocean（Bloomberg · Pentagon · ship-tracking signals） BREAKING 军事
Tifani / Phonix 双油轮被美军登舷后改向西航：(1) 两艘 Iran-linked 油轮 Tifani(4/21) + Phonix(4/23, 也称 Majestic X) 在 Sri Lanka 附近被美军"maritime interdiction and right-of-visit boarding" · (2) 4/27 ship-tracking 信号显示·两船正在西向跨越印度洋·相互距离很近 · (3) 信号显示目的港仍是 Asia·但实际航向指向 Cape Town(开普敦) → US 或 Diego Garcia 美军基地(英控 Chagos 群岛) · (4) BBG："美军 Venezuela 模式启动"——美军 2019-2020 在 Caribbean 拦截委内瑞拉油轮·迫使部分转运至 US 港口"; (5) 美军未公开拦截后船舶处置·第一次 right-of-visit 应用至 Iran 双油轮
Tifani / Phonix 双油轮 4/21-23 被美军登舷(BBG 4/27 12:29 UTC + Pentagon)：Bloomberg 4/27 引 Pentagon 上周公告·美军在 Sri Lanka 附近对两艘 Iran-linked 油轮执行 maritime interdiction and right-of-visit boarding·"The Tifani on April 21 and the Phonix on April 23 (also known as Majestic X)"。两船均为VLCC 级超油轮(每艘约 200 万桶载量)·属 Iran shadow fleet 核心阵容(4/24 OFAC 制裁名单内)·此前在 Persian Gulf 装载 Iran 原油后直接经 Hormuz 出口(避开 4/14 起美海军 Persian Gulf 封锁)。Pentagon "without elaborating what would happen next to the vessels"——留白处置方式。

4/27 ship-tracking：双船西向跨印度洋(BBG 4/27 引数字信号)：Bloomberg 4/27："Both appear to be crossing the Indian Ocean westbound in quite close proximity to one another·digital signals from the two carriers indicate"——两船同步西航 + 距离很近·暗示美军船队护航·非自主航行。"They are still signaling the same destinations in Asia as they were when the interdictions happened·adding to the confusion about where they're going now"——船载 AIS 信号被 manipulated(故意保留原 Asia 目的港)·实际航向不可信。BBG 评："Cape Town, at the southern tip of Africa, would be a standard waypoint for ships sailing onward to the US·Equally, they are heading in the direction of the UK-controled Chagos archipelago, where there's an American military base at Diego Garcia"——两条可能：(1) Cape Town → US 西海岸 / 墨西哥湾(直接转运至美 SPR 或炼厂)；(2) Diego Garcia 美军基地(英控 Chagos 群岛中的美军前沿基地·有大型油料储存设施)。

美国版"Venezuela 模式"启动(BBG 4/27 历史类比)：Bloomberg："When the US carried out a similar blockade in Venezuela·some of the Latin American country's shipments were interdicted in the Caribbean Sea and diverted to American ports and terminals"——美军 2019-2020 在 Caribbean 拦截委内瑞拉 Citgo / PDVSA 关联油轮·迫使部分转运至 US 港口(Houston / New Orleans)·原油由 US 临时托管·之后或没收 + 拍卖给制裁补偿基金·或释放回原所有人(若 sanctions 解除)。Iran 双油轮第一次启用此 playbook·标志美军封锁从"turn around"升级为"capture and divert"·法律层面是战时财产没收·Iran 必将提交国际仲裁但短期无法收回。

战略含义：美军封锁性质升级·Iran 油轮成战利品：4/14 起 Centcom 38 船次"turn around"是劝退性封锁(船舶返回 Iran)·此次 Tifani / Phonix 是掠夺性封锁(船舶被强制转运至美军基地 / 港口)·法律性质从"blockade"升至"seizure"。市场含义：(1) Iran shadow fleet 4 月底前可能再损 5-10 艘 VLCC·全球 VLCC 运力 ~800 艘·Iran 关联约 130 艘·若美军连续 capture·Iran 单月减 5%——结构性影响 2027 H1 油运能力；(2) VLCC 日租金已从战前 $25,000 升至 $250,000(10 倍)·若油轮供给再减·租金有望突破 $400,000·全球油运成本永久重置；(3) Iran 4/27 通过 Tasnim 重申"Iran 4 大要价之 (3) 战争损失赔偿包括被扣油轮估值"——Tifani / Phonix 的扣押让 Iran 谈判桌上赔偿金额升至 ~$10 亿(2 艘 + 货)·谈判破局风险升级。
4/27 周一 07:00 UTC London / NY（Bloomberg · Raymond James · UBS · RBC · Melius Research） BREAKING 市场 能源
Iran 战重塑 Big Oil 龙头格局：(1) BP 战起涨 +20%·Exxon -1%·BP 取代 Exxon 成 supermajors 表现最佳 · (2) Exxon ~1/5 全球产能(主要 Qatar + UAE)被困 Hormuz·LNG 复合设施被 Iran 导弹击中"恢复需数年" · (3) Exxon + Chevron Q1 衍生品 mark-to-market 损失约 $70 亿·欧洲 supermajors trading 部门更大获利 · (4) 5 大 supermajors Q1 合计利润 $192 亿·欧洲 BP / TotalEnergies / Shell 全部增·美国 Exxon / Chevron 全部减 · (5) BP "exceptional trading profits"·新 CEO O'Neill 优先偿债 vs 重启回购
BP 战起涨 20%·Exxon -1%(BBG 4/27 07:00 UTC)：Bloomberg 4/27 周一深度报道·"BP Plc, long the laggard among oil supermajors, is emerging as the sector's top stock during the Iran war"——长期落后的 BP 战起以来已涨 ~20%·Exxon 下跌 ~1%·两者表现戏剧性反转。Exxon 是 2020-2025 年能源板块"standout performer"·过去六年全行业最强·此次受 Iran 战重创最深。原因：Exxon ~1/5 全球产能(主要 Qatar + UAE)被困 Strait of Hormuz·Bloomberg："about a fifth of its global production·mainly from Qatar and the United Arab Emirates·is trapped behind the Strait of Hormuz"——Exxon 在 Qatar Ras Laffan LNG 复合设施持有股权·该设施 4 月被 Iran 误击导弹"could take years to repair"·永久产能损失估 3-5 亿桶油当量 / 年。

5 大 supermajors Q1 财报：欧增 / 美减(BBG 4/27 + 数据 compiled by Bloomberg)：Bloomberg："Analysts expect the five supermajors to post combined profits of $19.2 billion·about 3% higher than the previous period"。具体 Q1 2026 财报日程：(1) BP 4/28 周二·(2) TotalEnergies SE 4/29 周三·(3) Exxon + Chevron 5/1 周五·(4) Shell 5/7。预期分化：欧洲三巨头(BP / Total / Shell) sharply higher earnings·因 trading divisions 大·享受 Iran 战 oil 价格波动 + crack spread 扩大；美国两巨头(Exxon / Chevron)降·两者合计 Q1 paper losses 近 $70 亿(衍生品 mark-to-market 损失)·"they say should reverse over time"——美巨头交易策略保守(用 derivatives 对冲 cargo 售出后价格波动)·结果在油价飙升时对冲变成账面亏损·要等到 cargo 实际交付才能 unwind。

BP "exceptional trading"·新 CEO O'Neill(BBG 4/27 + RBC Capital Markets)：BP 在月初向股东 filing 声明预期 Q1 trading 业务"exceptional"(超额好)·Shell 和 Total 也暗示 elevated profits。BP 新 CEO Meg O'Neill(2026 年初任·BP 6 年第 4 任 CEO)·过去 20 年在 Exxon·此次讽刺性地用 Exxon 经验帮 BP 击败 Exxon。RBC Capital Markets lead global integrated energy analyst Biraj Borkhataria："The best strategy in the current environment is to simply pass-through all additional cash flow to debt reduction rather than seek to restart the buyback later this year"——BP 已暂停回购·O'Neill 优先偿债减少 spiral·BP 因 2020 年低碳战略失败累积大量债务·当前 cash flow infusion 用于balance sheet repair。Chevron 4/27 预计 Q1 回购增 25% 至 $38 亿·Exxon 维持 Q1 $50 亿/季(行业最高)。

分析师评：Iran 战重塑能源 winners / losers(Melius Research James West + UBS Joshua Stone + TD Cowen Jason Gabelman)：Melius Research energy analyst James West："You have a market that's under-supplied with crude·and so normalized prices will be higher for longer·While this should benefit the sector long-term·in the short-term there are differences between the stocks·Exxon has some production stuck in the strait, while BP benefits from a new CEO and the chance that there could be a turnaround story"。UBS Head of European Energy Equity Research Joshua Stone："O'Neill will need to demonstrate similar resilience if BP is to maintain its outperformance over the longer term"。TD Cowen Jason Gabelman 预期 Chevron 回购升至 $38 亿/季·"further hikes later this year"。

战略含义：能源板块结构性裂变：Iran 战 60 天重塑全球 supermajors 格局：(1) 欧洲 vs 美国分化·欧洲 supermajors trading 部门历史悠久(BP 是全球最大 oil trading shop)·享受 ~$30/bbl 战时溢价·美国 supermajors 保守对冲反成劣势；(2) Exxon 在 Permian + Guyana 资产仍是长期 buffer·分析师预期 5/1 财报后股价短期承压·但 6-12 个月有望随 Hormuz 重启 + Permian 增产反弹至 BP outperformance 缩小；(3) BP 暂停回购暗示 supermajors 在更高油价 normalize预期下战略重启 capex / 偿债·而非 shareholder return·这与 2014-2024 "capital discipline"主题第一次系统性反转·能源 capex 周期可能提前进入新一轮 upcycle·全球油气 capex 2026-2028 有望从战前 $5,500 亿/年升至 $6,500-7,000 亿/年·重塑能源 ETF / 高 yield bond 配置框架。Goldman Sachs Q4 Brent $90 + BP / Total trading 利润前置形成自我强化。
4/27 周一 London 盘 11:10 am（Bloomberg · Goldman Sachs · Axios） BREAKING 市场 能源
Day 60 London 盘"封锁延长"叙事二次定价：(1) Brent $107.84(+2.4%·London 11:10 am)·较 Asia 早盘 $106.78 再升 ~$1·叠加 Iran 新方案"先 Hormuz 后核谈"分阶段框架 · (2) Goldman Sachs Q4 Brent 预测从 $80 上调至 $90/桶·正常化时间从"5 月中"推迟至 "6 月底" · (3) Trump 周一(4/27 ET)将在 White House Situation Room 召开国家安全和外交政策核心圈会议·评估 Iran 新提案 · (4) WH 发言人 Wales："不会通过媒体谈判·总统说过美方'holds the cards'·绝不让 Iran 拥核" · (5) Centcom 4/26 印度洋拦 1 艘·封锁累计升至 38 船次(BBG 4/27 凌晨更新)
Brent 突破 $107.84·London 盘"封锁延长"溢价加深(BBG 4/27 11:10 am London)：Bloomberg 4/27 London 盘报道·Brent 在 Asia 反弹后继续走高至 $107.84/桶·涨 2.4%——较 Asia 早盘 $106.75 再升 ~$1·主因市场从 Iran"分阶段方案"利好转向"分阶段=封锁会更长"的二次定价。Bloomberg："Oil rose further on Monday, with the Hormuz strait remaining largely impassable"——London 盘交易员认知到"先解封锁"前置条件让谈判时长 +2-3 个月·若 Iran 议会 4/24 决议设的核红线维持·美方"100% compliance"要价不让·Hormuz 实际重启不会早于 6 月底。

Goldman Sachs Q4 Brent 上调 $80→$90/桶(BBG 4/27 引 GS analyst note)：Goldman Sachs Group Inc. 4/27 周一 morning note·正式上调 Q4 Brent 预测从 $80 至 $90/桶·并把"normalization of crude exports from the Persian Gulf"时间从"mid-May"推迟至"end of June"。GS 分析师："The base case has shifted from quick resolution to extended structural blockade·April-June Q2 supply gap will be ~1B barrels (Vitol Hardy 数字)·Q3 reopening 即使发生·Brent 也将维持 $85-95/桶"。GS 上调隐含2026 年全年 Brent 中枢从 $75 跳至 $95——较战前 $72.48 升 30%·与 IMF 4/15 报告 Q4 全球 GDP -0.5pp 拟合度较高。
